programme.title: Modigliani
programme.desc: American drama, produced in 2004. An American, French, German, Italian, Rumanian, and British co-production. The story of Amedeo Modiglianis bitter rivalry with Pablo Picasso, and his tragic romance with Jeanne Hebuterne.

programme.title: Operation Chromite
programme.desc: In 1950, just a few months after North Korean forces have overrun most of South Korea, an American-led United Nations Command is deployed to Korea to aid the struggling South Koreans. General Douglas MacArthur devises a secret plan to attack behind enemy lines at the port city of Incheon. The risky strategy is opposed by leaders of the other military branches, forcing MacArthur to devise a clandestine operation to gather essential information from within occupied Incheon by coordinating a weeklong South Korean intelligence operation known as "X-Ray".

programme.title: Slackers
programme.desc: Dave Goodman, Sam Schecter, and Jeff Davis are best friends who have spent almost four years at Holden University scamming their way through college. During one exam scam in their final semester Dave discovers Angela, and asks her out while writing his phone number on her exam sheet. Ethan Dulles (who calls himself "Cool Ethan"), a classmate obsessed with Angela to the extent of collecting loose hairs and making a hair doll and having surveillance photos and a shrine to Angela setup in his dorm room, takes her exam question sheet after Angela leaves and uses it to repeatedly confront and then blackmail the guys into setting up a successful date with Angela for him in exchange for his silence on the matter. The guys set Ethan up in multiple situations in an attempt to convince Angela to like him, while Dave tells Sam during their work researching her that Angela is no more important to him as any other scam theyve done. Ethan fails to attract her after frequent confrontations based on his delusional behavior, immaturity and ignorance of social norms. Though Ethan seems a lonely harmless nerd, he is scheming, psychotically obsessive and hopelessly socially incompetent.

programme.title: Max Cloud
programme.desc: A space cruiser crash lands on the purple planet of Heinous, an intergalactic prison that is home to the most vile and dangerous villains in the galaxy. All of the crew have perished except for its pilot; intergalactic space hero Max Cloud, the ships hapless chef Jake, and its reluctant Commander, Rexy. Their mission is simple, wait inside their vessel until help arrives and try their best to keep the prisoners outside from getting in, however this is Max Cloud and he doesnt do simple. ...But this is not real life. This is a video-game, and at the helm of the adventure is Sarah, a teenage video game fanatic who immerses herself in fantasy to avoid dealing with her less than packed social life and a strained relationship with her dad, straight laced single parent Tony. After a fallout, Tony bans Sarah from playing games and in a frenzy of teenage emotion Sarah makes a wish, that in the blink of an eye becomes a reality... With a flash of pixelated light Sarah is transported into the video game by the mysterious Space Witch, who exists in an etherial void, behind a secret door, that never appears in the same place twice! So Sarah finds herself trapped inside the game and the only person who can help her is her equally socially defunct but incredibly charming friend, Cowboy, who must control Sarah from her bedroom in Brooklyn and keep her from losing her one life, in a game that cant be paused, that they have never finished before! To make matters worse Sarah has not found herself inside the body of the wonderful Max Cloud, but Jake, thats right... the hapless chef. We follow Sarah as she negotiates the terrifying and dangerous planet of Heinous alongside the ever confident Max and fed up Rexy, jumping back and forth with the real world as the pressure mounts on Cowboy and the real stakes start to rise. They soon encounter stranded Bounty Hunter, Brock Donnelly, and realise they must get off the planet before help arrives as the planets surface burns so hot every day that anything not underground is space liquid! AND to add to the stakes Cowboy must keep his best friend away from the evil clutches of the games villain Revengor, a part man, part machine, lunatic who is hell bent on taking Max Clouds ship and with an army of prisoners and an evil sorcersss called SHEE, his chances look pretty damn good. The action bounces between the video game and the real world as Cowboy and Sarah must come together to get her home, all leading to the ultimate showdown in Revengors lair, where back in Brooklyn, video game expertise arrives in the form of a very unlikely hero. Sit down. Plug in. Its time to play THE INTERGALACTIC ADVENTURES OF MAX CLOUD.

programme.title: Score: A Hockey Musical
programme.desc: Seventeen-year-old Farley has led a sheltered life, raised on a diet of home schooling, organic living and trips to the art gallery. To his parents dismay, Farley loves to play hockey with the local kids. To their even greater dismay, Farley is scouted and signed by the owner of a junior league team, where he becomes an instant star. But Farley discovers that stardom comes with a price - including the expectation to fight on the ice. Throw in a changing relationship with his best friend, and Farley finds himself losing his way.

programme.title: The Adventure Scouts
programme.desc: A coming of age movie about a group of boys and girls called "adventure scouts" who return from a camping trip to discover their small town is being held captive by a gang of motorcycle-riding knuckleheads. Using only their scouting knowledge and camping equipment, the kids take down the gang members one by one, reunite with family members, and restore the communitys sense of pride.

programme.title: No Limit Kids
programme.desc: Ashton, Celeste, and Becca are three unlikely middle school outcasts who form a club in an abandoned theater. There, they meet Charlie (Bill Cobbs, Night at the Museum), a homeless man who shares their passion for musical theater. When the theater is scheduled to be torn down, the teenagers set out to save the landmark with a modern-day performance of Shakespeares Much Ado About Nothing. Along the way, the group learns to treat others with respect and stand up for their beliefs. This Dove-approved film also features Emmy and Golden Globe nominee Lee Meriwether.

programme.title: Baba
programme.desc: An weird but witty old woman is forced to deal with an ambiguous future after her country, family and the entire system of values are ruined. She is trying to solve her existential problems catching d trying to sell a rewarded war criminal as he was a rabbit in a wood. The only thing she did not know if he is really him.

programme.title: Foolproof
programme.desc: Kevin, Samantha and Rob live for Foolproof; their own private club where through high-tech, meticulously thought out and executed plans, they pull off the most impossible of heists - all in theory that is. Theyve never actually done it for real. But all that changes when Leo, a cutthroat British gangster, rips off their foolproof plans for a diamond heist and uses it to successfully execute the robbery. Threatening to implicate them, Leo blackmails them to pull off a robbery worth $20 million in corporate bonds.

programme.title: North and South: The Battle of New Market
programme.desc: Based on a true story of the American Civil War, culminating at the Battle of New Market, May 1864. A group of teenage cadets sheltered from war at the Virginia Military Institute must confront the horrors of an adult world when they are called upon to defend the Shenandoah Valley. Leaving behind their youth, these cadets must decide what they are fighting for.

programme.title: Corner Office
programme.desc: Orson, a compulsive bureaucrat who discovers a secret room.

programme.title: 10 Things We Should Do Before We Break Up
programme.desc: Abigail, a self-sufficient single mom meets Ben. They both think every great relationship ends in disaster. On the first date they come up with 10 things to do together before they break up. But the estimated end is not so sure - because fate adds #11 to their list.

programme.title: Talea
programme.desc: Summertime. Everybody is excited to go on vacation to Italy. Everybody but Jasmin. Jasmin is yearning something. She wants to be with Eva, her mother, from whom she had to live seperately for a long time. For weeks, Jasmin is trying to get close to Eva. She does not give up, even if shes rejected. After an argument, Jasmin runs away from her fosterhome and convinces Eva to leave the city together and go on a trip. The two get closer -- sometimes as friends, sometimes as mother and daughter. A first joint cigarette, a dance in the village disco, wanderings through the woods. But expectations and needs of the girl and her mother are diverging repeatedly, especially when a man attracts Evas attention and disturbs the growing closeness between mother and daughter.

programme.title: Hangman
programme.desc: Mystery movie. American mystery, produced in 2017. Retired homicide detective Ray Archer and his partner, ex FBI agent Will Ruiney, are assigned to track down a vicious serial killer, who is playing a twisted version of the childrens game Hangman.

programme.title: Noble Things
programme.desc: Jimmy Wayne Collins finds himself adrift in Memphis, Tennessee. Forced to return home to the piney woods of Southeast Texas, Jimmy will face his imprisoned brother, his dying father and the demons he left behind.

programme.title: Wake
programme.desc: When things get tough for offbeat Carys Reitman, she does what any emotionally isolated, modern girl would do - she goes to strangers funerals. At one fateful funeral, she unexpectedly meets Tyler, a man mourning his fiancee. Despite the warnings of her undertaker best friend Shane and her roommate Lila, she finds herself connecting to someone for the first time. Searching for answers, Carys goes to see her estranged mother to confront her past. And as she tries to open herself to the risks of love with Tyler, she realizes she may have more to fear than just a broken heart.

programme.title: The Humanity Bureau
programme.desc: Science fiction movie. Canadian sci-fi, produced in 2017. A dystopian thriller set in the year 2030 that sees the world in a permanent state of economic recession and facing serious environmental problems as a result of global warming.

programme.title: Shaka Zulu: The Citadel: Shaka Zulu: The Citadel
programme.desc: Prentice Mungo (David Hasselhoff) is a slave-trader who discovers that his ship is carrying a stowaway, Katherine (Karen Allen). Katherine is seeking passage to Africa to see her father, a British officer stationed there. But when they arrive, Mungo discovers Shaka, king of the Zulu tribe, among the slaves he is going to be transporting. Using his cleverness and leadership abilities, Zulu incites the slaves to revolt, and takes Katherine captive as he flees into the African countryside.

programme.title: Guido Superstar: The Rise of Guido
programme.desc: An Italian immigrant is thrust into the world of drug-lords, supercars and secret agents in this hilarious action comedy. After losing his job at the Disco Valet Company for undue heroism, Guido (Silvio Pollio) must pose as a Sicilian gangster for the FBI in order to infiltrate a powerful Asian gang. Things go sour and take a turn for the worse. Guido must now make amends before he is discovered and killed, or worse, deported.

programme.title: Raspberry Magic
programme.desc: "Raspberry Magic" is a coming-of-age story about 11-year-old Monica Shah, who thinks she must win the science fair in order to bring her father back after he runs out on the family. She blames herself for her parents problems, and takes charge when her mother falls into a deep depression. Set behind the backdrop of a beautiful forest, Monicas experiment uses touch therapy to help raspberries grow faster. She asks, is it nature or nurture that can truly help a being grow? Does it even matter? Through her ups and downs with her family, she learns that its a complex question, and the answer isnt so simple.

programme.title: Nico the Unicorn
programme.desc: A 12-year-old disabled boy, whose father recently passed away, has his life changed when the pony he rescues gives birth to a unicorn. Can he save the unicorn from the people who want to exploit it?

programme.title: House of the Stone Monkeys
programme.desc: The action proceeds along two tracks and two time frames. We meet the boy, who lives with his mother in a Budapest apartment house, in the summer of 2012. Another boy is spending his vacation with his grandparents in the same building in the summer of 1982. The house unveils its mysterious secret to both of them.

programme.title: Rat Race
programme.desc: Donald P. Sinclair has placed six separate gold coins in different slot machines in his casino. The lucky six who find these coins discover an opportunity of a lifetime. The chance to own $2 million. Locked up in a locker in New Mexico, these six contestants must now race each other, to be the first to the cash. There are no rules in place and everything that could possibly happen, does. Whilst, behind the scenes, Sinclairs associates are placing their bets.

programme.title: Caesar
programme.desc: Epic look at Julius Caesar, Romes last dictator, whose death also signaled the end of the Roman Republic. Chronicles his campaigns in Gaul and Egypt, his rivalry with General Pompey, and his eventual assassination at the hands of Brutus and Cassius.

programme.title: Headwinds
programme.desc: Based on Olivier Adams bestselling novel, "Des Vents Contraires," it tells the story of Paul. Since his wife, Sarah, disappeared without a trace, Paul lives alone with his two young children. But a year has passed, a year in which he had to reinvent himself every day—and Paul is exhausted.

programme.title: The Ambassador to Bern
programme.desc: Attila Szaszs political thriller portraying the events of the hostage taking of the Hungarian ambassador to Switzerland in the aftermath of the 1956 Hungarian Revolution. The film was presented at numerous festivals all over the world. It won the Frederico Fellini Award at Tiburon International Film Festival.

programme.title: Cookies Fortune
programme.desc: Cookies Fortune unfolds over an eventful Easter weekend in the small town of Holly Springs, Mississippi. The town residents are peaceful, kind folk--with the exception of Camille Dixon (Glenn Close) - a pushy theatre director with an incredibly shy younger sister, Cora (Julianne Moore), whose estranged daughter Emma (Liv Tyler) has just returned to town. On the heels of her latest play, Camille is shocked to discover that her Aunt Jewel Mae "Cookie" Orcutt (Patricia Neal) has committed suicide. Terrified at the thought of how this will tarnish the family name, she eats the suicide note to make it look like a burglary. This set-up leads the police to one main suspect, Willis Richland (Charles S. Dutton), who also happens to be Cookies best friend. Although the rest of the town is convinced Willis didnt commit the crime, an outside investigator (Courtney B. Vance) isnt so sure. As Easter Sunday and opening night of the play arrive, the truth comes out, revealing more secrets than anyone could have possibly imagined.

programme.title: Almost Friends
programme.desc: Charlie, a culinary genius, has lost the motivation. He doesnt know what to with his life anymore, but he knows one thing - get close to Amber. In comparison to her boyfriend, he seems to be totally unattractive, but Charlies closest friend convinces him that where theres a will theres a way.

programme.title: Shoreditch
programme.desc: In London 1939, before the beginning of the Second World War, Thomas and his wife Massie run the Say When jazz club. But when he starts having an affair with singer Butterfly, their world disintegrates into blackmail, drugs, and suicide.

programme.title: Cell
programme.desc: John Cusack and Samuel L Jackson star in director Tod Williams horror, from screenplay adapted from his own novel by Stephen King. Its a normal day at Boston International Airport, with travellers on their way to and from their destinations, and airport, airline and security staff going about their business, and most of them using their mobile phones. Among them is Clay Riddell (Cusack), whos talking to his estranged wife and their young son, until his battery dies and he switches to a payphone. The inconvenience saves his life: just as his cash runs out, everyone using a mobile device around him receives an electronic pulse that causes agony and then turns them into uncontrollable ultraviolent killers. Clay narrowly escapes the mayhem and finds shelter in the paralysed subway system below the airport, where train driver Tom McCourt (Jackson) offers to lead the survivors to safety on foot. But the incident is a nationwide phenomenon, so getting out of the airport is just the start of their battle to stay alive.

programme.title: When Do We Eat?
programme.desc: A familys Passover gets screwy after the patriarch unknowingly ingests a hit of Ecstasy.

programme.title: Shaka Zulu: The Citadel
programme.desc: Prentice Mungo (David Hasselhoff) is a slave-trader who discovers that his ship is carrying a stowaway, Katherine (Karen Allen). Katherine is seeking passage to Africa to see her father, a British officer stationed there. But when they arrive, Mungo discovers Shaka, king of the Zulu tribe, among the slaves he is going to be transporting. Using his cleverness and leadership abilities, Zulu incites the slaves to revolt, and takes Katherine captive as he flees into the African countryside.

programme.title: Pils zemē
programme.desc: Pēc mātes pāragras nāves pusaudzis sadraudzējas ar savu harizmātisko, tomēr nemierīgo kaimiņu, un nonāk atkarību un vardarbības pasaulē. Tas notiek tieši tad, kad viņu mazpilsētu pārņem opioīdu epidēmija.

programme.title: Mans draugs zombijs
programme.desc: Pēc tam, kad ļoti neparasts zombijs izglābj vēl dzīvu meiteni no uzbrukuma, abi izveido attiecības, kas aizsāk visu nedzīvo pasauli pārveidojošus notikumus.

programme.title: Slow TV
programme.desc: Pastaiga ziemas brīnumzemē

programme.title: Kas skatāms Filmzone?
programme.desc: Iepazīstinām ar Filmzone filmām.

programme.title: Pils zemē
programme.desc: Pēc mātes pāragras nāves pusaudzis sadraudzējas ar savu harizmātisko, tomēr nemierīgo kaimiņu, un nonāk atkarību un vardarbības pasaulē. Tas notiek tieši tad, kad viņu mazpilsētu pārņem opioīdu epidēmija.

programme.title: Muļķu nauda
programme.desc: Parasts puisis iegulda savus iekrājumus videospēļu veikala GameStop akcijās un sāk par to rakstīt internetā. Kad viņa ieraksti sociālajos tīklos kļūst aizvien populārāki, un akciju tēma kļūst par kustību, visi kļūst bagāti - līdz pretī cīnīties sāk miljardieri.

programme.title: Mans draugs zombijs
programme.desc: Pēc tam, kad ļoti neparasts zombijs izglābj vēl dzīvu meiteni no uzbrukuma, abi izveido attiecības, kas aizsāk visu nedzīvo pasauli pārveidojošus notikumus.

programme.title: Pils zemē
programme.desc: Pēc mātes pāragras nāves pusaudzis sadraudzējas ar savu harizmātisko, tomēr nemierīgo kaimiņu, un nonāk atkarību un vardarbības pasaulē. Tas notiek tieši tad, kad viņu mazpilsētu pārņem opioīdu epidēmija.

programme.title: Muļķu nauda
programme.desc: Parasts puisis iegulda savus iekrājumus videospēļu veikala GameStop akcijās un sāk par to rakstīt internetā. Kad viņa ieraksti sociālajos tīklos kļūst aizvien populārāki, un akciju tēma kļūst par kustību, visi kļūst bagāti - līdz pretī cīnīties sāk miljardieri.

programme.title: Dziļi kosmosā
programme.desc: Kosmosa kuģis ar trīs cilvēku apkalpi dodas divu gadu ilgā misijā uz Marsu, lai izzinātu, vai uz šīs planētas iespējams dzīvot. Jau esot ceļā, viņi atklāj, ka uz kuģa ir ceturtais pasažieris, kurš tur nonācis nejauši. Ir par vēlu, lai atgrieztos, taču kuģa dzīvības uzturēšanas sistēmas ir bojātas, resursi strauji izsīkst, un visiem izdzīvot nebūs iespējams. Komanda nonāk smagas izšķiršanās priekšā. Galvenajās lomās: Anna Kendrika, Daniels Dae Kims, Tonija Kolete

programme.title: Es gribu tevi atpakaļ
programme.desc: Pīters un Emma iepazinās brīdī, kad abus vienoja līdzīgas bēdas - viņus bija pametušas viņu dzīves mīlestības. Sagrauti un sāpināti viņi nolemj to tā neatstāt - viņi taču var izjaukt savu bijušo jaunās attiecības! Viņi apvieno spēkus, lai viens otram palīdzētu, taču asprātīgajam plānam izrādās negaidīts iznākums. Galvenajās lomās: Čārlijs Dejs, Dženija Sleita, Skots Īstvuds

programme.title: Sekss un lielpilsēta
programme.desc: Kerijas Bredšovas sapnis beidzot ir piepildījies – viņa precēsies ar Lielisko vīrieti. Viņš jau reiz ir bijis laulībā, tāpēc vēlas nelielas svinības, taču Kerija, pielaikojot labāko dizaineru kāzu kleitas, ātri vien aizraujas ar domu par modes dāmas sapņu kāzām. Pēc sarunas ar Mirandu, kura būtībā runā par savas laulības problēmām, Lielisko vīrieti pārņem šaubas. Stīva un Mirandas attiecībās iestājies panīkums, tāpēc abi pārguļ ar citiem cilvēkiem un galu galā izšķiras. Kad Lieliskais vīrietis pamet Keriju pie altāra, draudzenes dodas ceļojumā, kam bija jākļūst par jaunā pāra medusmēnesi. Draudzenes ir lieliska kompānija, taču Kerija nespēj uzreiz atgūt dzīvesprieku. Samantu kaitina prombūtne no arvien nevaļīgākā Smita, kura aktiera karjera uzņem apgriezienus, tāpēc viņa izseko glīto jaunekli. Valentīna dienā Miranda atzīstas Kerijai, ka ir vainojama Lieliskā vīrieša bēgšanā. Rezultātā Kerija izlīgst ar savu mīļoto, un abi salaulājas miertiesneša kabinetā.

programme.title: Dziļi kosmosā
programme.desc: Kosmosa kuģis ar trīs cilvēku apkalpi dodas divu gadu ilgā misijā uz Marsu, lai izzinātu, vai uz šīs planētas iespējams dzīvot. Viņi apvieno spēkus, lai viens otram palīdzētu, taču asprātīgajam plānam izrādās negaidīts iznākums. Galvenajās lomās: Čārlijs Dejs, Dženija Sleita, Skots Īstvuds

programme.title: Meklēju draugu pasaules galam
programme.desc: Uzzinot par to, ka cilvēces pēdējie mēģinājumi apturēt gigantisko, Zemei tuvojošos asteroīdu ir izgāzušies, Dodžs (Karels) dodas savā pēdējā ceļojumā. Viņš grib sameklēt savu seno mīlestību, lai atklātu savas jūtas pirms pasaulei ir pienācis gals. Palīdzēt Dodžam viņa neparastajā misijā apņemas kaimiņiene Penija (Naitlija), kas tikko izšķīrusies no sava drauga-egoista. Kamēr varoņi tuvojas savam mērķim, pa ceļam vērojot nolemtās cilvēces trakulības, starp viņiem pilnīgi nevietā uzplaukst romantiskas attiecības.

programme.title: Mušpapīrs
programme.desc: Vienkāršs gājiens uz banku, lai izņemtu skaidru naudu, Tripam beidzas ar nokļūšanu gūstā pie divām bankas aplaupītāju bandām vienlaikus. Viņam nākas veikt viltīgus un drosmīgus trikus, lai atbrīvotu ķīlniekus un iekarotu klusībā mīlētās bankas darbinieces sirdi. Taču nekas nav tā, kā tas sākumā izskatās, un pārsteigumi seko viens otram.

programme.title: Rītdienas robeža
programme.desc: Zemi iekaro citplanētu iebrucēji, un pēc piecu gadu cīņām viņi ir gandrīz iekarojuši Eiropu. Ģenerālis Brigems (Brendans Glīsons) nosūta majoru Viljamu Keidžu (Toms Krūzs) kā dezertieri uz savu jauno vienību – J vadu. Jau pirmajā kaujā Keidžu nogalina, taču viņš šokēts atmostas iepriekšējā dienā. Izmisīgos centienos izlauzties no apnicīgās laika cilpas, Keidžu sāk trenēt elites kareive Rita Vrataski (Emīlija Blanta), kura ir cilvēces pretošanās simbols. Viņas vadībā Keidžs kļūst par Zemes labāko ieroci un iespēju, kā iznīcināt citplanētu iebrucējus.

programme.title: Meklēju draugu pasaules galam
programme.desc: Uzzinot par to, ka cilvēces pēdējie mēģinājumi apturēt gigantisko, Zemei tuvojošos asteroīdu ir izgāzušies, Dodžs (Karels) dodas savā pēdējā ceļojumā. Viņš grib sameklēt savu seno mīlestību, lai atklātu savas jūtas pirms pasaulei ir pienācis gals. Palīdzēt Dodžam viņa neparastajā misijā apņemas kaimiņiene Penija (Naitlija), kas tikko izšķīrusies no sava drauga-egoista. Kamēr varoņi tuvojas savam mērķim, pa ceļam vērojot nolemtās cilvēces trakulības, starp viņiem pilnīgi nevietā uzplaukst romantiskas attiecības.

programme.title: Slow TV
programme.desc: Pavasara krāsas.

programme.title: Kas skatāms Filmzone?
programme.desc: Iepazīstinām ar Filmzone filmām.

programme.title: Labākais manī
programme.desc: Lai gan Amanda un Davsons nāk no dažādiem sociālajiem slāņiem, viņu mīlasstāsts, kurš sācies jau pusaudžu vecumā, ir pierādījums tam, ka dvēseļu radinieki eksistē. Kāds negadījums jauniešus izšķir. Paiet teju 20 gadi, kad nejaušība viņus atkal saved kopā. Amanda ir nelaimīgi precējusies un sirds dziļumos joprojām nespēj piedot Davsonam, ka viņš no viņas reiz atteicies, tomēr skaidrs ir viens - intensīvās jūtas, kas piedzīvotas jaunībā, nav mazinājušās, bet tikai pieņēmušās spēkā. Vai dvēseles radiniekiem liktenis lēmis būt kopā?

programme.title: Kas skatāms Filmzone Plus?
programme.desc: Iepazīstinām ar Filmzone Plus filmām.

programme.title: Slow TV
programme.desc: Pastaiga sniegotā purvā

programme.title: Melnais gulbis
programme.desc: Ņujorkas baleta trupas balerīnas Ninas dzīve ir deja. Viņa dzīvo kopā ar māti Ēriku, kas ir izbijusi balerīna un aizgūtnēm atbalsta meitas profesionālās ambīcijas. Kad mākslinieciskais režisors izlemj nomainīt prīmu izrādē "Gulbju ezers", viņa izvēle ir tieši Nina. Tomēr viņai uzrodas konkurente - jaunā dejotāja Lilī, kuras sniegums arī aizrauj režisoru. Izrādei ir vajadzīga dejotāja, kas spēj nodejot gan Balto gulbi ar nevainību un grāciju, kā arī Melno gulbi, kas iemieso viltu un jutekliskumu. Nina pilnībā atbilst Baltā tēlam, bet Lilī ir Melnā gulbja iemiesojums. Kad jaunās dejotājas uzsāk sāncensību par šo lomu, viņu draudzība kļūst arvien sarežģītāka un Nina arvien vairāk saskaras ar draudzenes rakstura tumšo pusi un abas ir gatavas viena otru iznīcināt.

programme.title: Septiņas artērijas
programme.desc: Ievērojamai teātra režisorei dots uzdevums atjaunot sava bijušā mentora slavenāko darbu — operu "Salome". Dažas satraucošas atmiņas no pagātnes liks apspiestajai traumai iekrāsot tagadni.

programme.desc: Stāsts par 80 gadus vecu Jūliju, kura pārdomā lēmumus un apstākļus savā dzīvē, kas varēja viņu novest pa dažādiem ceļiem.

programme.title: Bolero
programme.desc: 1928. gadā horeogrāfe Ida Rubinšteina Parīzē pasūtīja Morisam Ravēlam mūziku savam nākamajam baletam. Esot iedvesmas krīzē, komponists izvērtē savu dzīvi un nolemj veltīties universāla šedevra - "Bolero" - radīšanai.

programme.title: Tu būsi mans dēls
programme.desc: Polam nav ticības, ka viņa dēls Martins mantos prestižo ģimenes vīna darītavu. Pols sapņo par strādīgu, veiksmīgu dēlu - sapni, kas kādu dienu, šķiet, piepildās, kad viņš satiek Filipu, sava mirstošā muižas pārvaldnieka dēlu.

programme.title: Džūlija(s)
programme.desc: Stāsts par 80 gadus vecu Jūliju, kura pārdomā lēmumus un apstākļus savā dzīvē, kas varēja viņu novest pa dažādiem ceļiem.

programme.title: Kas skatāms Filmzone Plus?
programme.desc: Iepazīstinām ar Filmzone Plus filmām.

programme.title: Bobbys Triple Threat
programme.desc: Features one competitor per episode who enters Bobbys secret kitchen to compete against professional chefs in three head-to-head rounds. If the competitor can out-cook the titans and earn more points, they take home the cash prize.

programme.title: Ciao House
programme.desc: Hosts and judges Alex Guarnaschelli and Gabe Bertaccini welcome 10 talented chefs to Ciao House, where they will live together in a beautiful Tuscan villa and be tested like never before on their proficiency with Italian cuisine. Two chefs receive a huge advantage going into the next round, and one chef must say "Ciao Ciao" to the villa.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummon is a writer, photographer, ranch wife and mother of four. She is the host of cooking show The Pioneer Woman. She cooks in a simple, easy to follow way at her ranch in Pawhuska, Oklahoma. We can learn new techniques and get new ideas in a down to earth way and feed even big families every day with dishes that are both yummy and healthy. It is surprisingly easy to cook following her recipes step by step. Her passion for cooking is appreciated by more than 22 million of people all over the world.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummon is a writer, photographer, ranch wife and mother of four. She is the host of cooking show The Pioneer Woman. She cooks in a simple, easy to follow way at her ranch in Pawhuska, Oklahoma. We can learn new techniques and get new ideas in a down to earth way and feed even big families every day with dishes that are both yummy and healthy. It is surprisingly easy to cook following her recipes step by step. Her passion for cooking is appreciated by more than 22 million of people all over the world.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: Chopped is an American reality cooking TV game show hosted by Ted Allen. Four chefs compete against each other. At the beginning of each round they receive a basket containing four mystery ingredients and are expected to create the best three-course meal using every single one of them. Each round has a time limit. The dishes are judged based on their presentation, taste and creativity. At the end of every round one chef is "chopped" from the competition with no prize. The winner can get up to $50.000.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible
programme.desc: After combating countless "impossible dinners," Chef Robert Irvine faces a daunting new challenge: save Americas most desperate restaurants from impending failure in just two days with only $10,000. In his new prime-time Food Network series, Restaurant: Impossible, Robert uses creativity and resourcefulness along with a lot of muscle in his fight to rescue these restaurants and give hope to the owners and their employees. Day one of the extreme mission begins with a thorough business assessment as Robert launches the restaurant into full service, closely observes the staff and kitchen, and determines their weakest spots. Then, he springs into action by updating the menu, retraining the staff and implementing aesthetic changes with the help of his design team. To ensure a packed house for the grand re-opening at the end of day two, Robert hits the streets to tell the community about the improved restaurant. Will the ruthless schedule, tight budget and ambitious task overcome Roberts lofty goals, or will this tall order result in restaurant triumph?

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives is American food reality television series about places with the most delicious food. The host is American restaurateur Guy Fieri who travels along the USA, Canada or Europe looking for the most fascinating cafes and introduces them to the viewers. Each show has a specific focus on a certain dish, like burgers, pasta, comfort food. Small cafes with traditional food and home-style recipes or ethnic specialties adored by the locals are of particular interest to the host. Guy Fieri enters the kitchen, gets to know the cook, actively takes part in cooking, interacts with the guests and kitchen staff and gives his humorous spicy comments on the process and the food itself.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Two talented chefs go head-to-head for the chance to Beat Bobby Flay. To get to Bobby the chefs must first face off against each other, creating a spectacular dish with a secret ingredient of Bobbys choice. Judges Alex Guarnaschelli and Jeff Mauro know Bobbys strengths and his weaknesses. Their goal: Pick the chef who has the skills to take down Bobby Flay in his own arena. The winning chef gets to challenge Bobby with his or her surprise signature dish. If Bobby goes down, the winner can tell the world, "I beat Bobby Flay!"

programme.title: Spring Baking Championship
programme.desc: American cooking competition that sees aspirational bakers producing a variety of sweet and savoury treats in the hopes of taking home the $50,000 grand prize. Join the contestants as theyre pushed to their limits in a series of intense heats; each designed to showcase their culinary skills and test their ability to produce outstanding baked goods. With the competition heating up and a panel of experienced professional judges to impress, which baker will reign supreme and wholl be the first to crumble?

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible
programme.desc: Robert Irvine comes to the rescue of a Maryland seafood restaurant that has been in the family for more than 60 years and is on the brink of closing its doors. Third-generation owner Chad and his sister, Cara, attempt to salvage whats left of their family legacy, determined to keep alive the memory of their late parents and grandparents. With the finances in disarray, nonexistent leadership and a divide between the uninspired staff and stubborn management, Robert faces one of his toughest challenges to keep this family business afloat.

programme.title: Bobbys Triple Threat
programme.desc: Features one competitor per episode who enters Bobbys secret kitchen to compete against professional chefs in three head-to-head rounds. If the competitor can out-cook the titans and earn more points, they take home the cash prize.

programme.title: Cutthroat Kitchen: Knives Out
programme.desc: Just how far is a chef willing to go to win a cooking competition? Hosted by Brian Malarkey, Cutthroat Kitchen: Knives Out hands four chefs each $25,000 and the opportunity to spend that money on helping themselves or sabotaging their competitors. Ingredients will be thieved, utensils destroyed and valuable time on the clock lost when the chefs compete to cook delicious dishes while also having to outplot the competition. Nothing is out of bounds when money changes hands and we see just how far chefs will go to ensure they have the winning dish.

programme.title: Spring Baking Championship: Easter
programme.desc: Sunny Anderson asks the remaining bakers to make over-the-top charcuterie boards filled with Easter treats. Then, the competitors try to fool the judges.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is a cookbook author who combines her country lifestyle with her Jewish and Chinese heritage to create the most delicious new dishes. A former big city girl, Yeh is multi talented, a successful blogger and classically trained musician, its food that ultimately stole her heart. Learn lots of tricks and tips with Yeh as she cooks up her personal favourite recipes for every occasion, from family visits to brunch with the girls to a classic farm supper! This show is an absolute treat.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri finds funky flavour with waffles in Syracuse, NY, mushroom asada in Allston, MA, and queso and mojo pork-topped tots in Minneapolis.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieris catching up with a top taco spot in Phoenix, a real-deal Italian joint in Boston, and a "meatless" butcher in Minneapolis.

programme.title: Alex Vs America
programme.desc: Brave and talented chefs attempt to take down Iron Chef Alex Guarnaschelli, the most feared and accomplished competition cook in America. Chef Alex goes up against three chefs in two rounds of cooking, and anyone -- even Alex -- can be sent home after a blind tasting by the judges. Each chef hails from a different state, but they all share the same culinary specialty and drive to beat Alex for ultimate bragging rights and $15,000.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship
programme.desc: In Food Networks series Kids Baking Championship, hosts and judges Duff Goldman and Valerie Bertinelli will lead eight talented kid bakers through challenges designed to find the most-impressive and creative young baker. In each challenge the contestants, ranging in age from 10 to 13, will be tested on their baking skills and originality as they whip up delectable desserts, including creative cakes, mouthwatering cookies and pastries.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods
programme.desc: Travel and cuisine documentary series, hosted by famous Andrew Zimmern, American culinary expert, chef, restaurateur and television personality and spin-off series of Bizarre Foods, focuses on classic, iconic foods (not bizarre like in the original series) from some well-known destinations- moussaka and real Greek yogurt from Athens, sweet macarons and crepes from Paris, Italian gelato, gooey fondue to Swiss chocolate from Zurich, mile-high pastrami sandwiches and bagels from NYC, and many other legendary foods. The show will explore where these dishes came from, how theyre prepared, and the best way to enjoy them. Andrew will also discover some secrets and interesting stories behind these epic meals.

We can learn new techniques and get new ideas in a down to earth way and feed even big families every day with dishes that are both yummy and healthy. It is surprisingly easy to cook following her recipes step by step. Her passion for cooking is appreciated by more than 22 million of people all over the world.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: Chopped is an American reality cooking TV game show hosted by Ted Allen. Four chefs compete against each other. At the beginning of each round they receive a basket containing four mystery ingredients and are expected to create the best three-course meal using every single one of them. Each round has a time limit. The dishes are judged based on their presentation, taste and creativity. At the end of every round one chef is "chopped" from the competition with no prize. The winner can get up to $50.000.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible
programme.desc: After combating countless "impossible dinners," Chef Robert Irvine faces a daunting new challenge: save Americas most desperate restaurants from impending failure in just two days with only $10,000. In his new prime-time Food Network series, Restaurant: Impossible, Robert uses creativity and resourcefulness along with a lot of muscle in his fight to rescue these restaurants and give hope to the owners and their employees. Day one of the extreme mission begins with a thorough business assessment as Robert launches the restaurant into full service, closely observes the staff and kitchen, and determines their weakest spots. Then, he springs into action by updating the menu, retraining the staff and implementing aesthetic changes with the help of his design team. To ensure a packed house for the grand re-opening at the end of day two, Robert hits the streets to tell the community about the improved restaurant. Will the ruthless schedule, tight budget and ambitious task overcome Roberts lofty goals, or will this tall order result in restaurant triumph?

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives is American food reality television series about places with the most delicious food. The host is American restaurateur Guy Fieri who travels along the USA, Canada or Europe looking for the most fascinating cafes and introduces them to the viewers. Each show has a specific focus on a certain dish, like burgers, pasta, comfort food. Small cafes with traditional food and home-style recipes or ethnic specialties adored by the locals are of particular interest to the host. Guy Fieri enters the kitchen, gets to know the cook, actively takes part in cooking, interacts with the guests and kitchen staff and gives his humorous spicy comments on the process and the food itself.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Two talented chefs go head-to-head for the chance to Beat Bobby Flay. To get to Bobby the chefs must first face off against each other, creating a spectacular dish with a secret ingredient of Bobbys choice. Judges Alex Guarnaschelli and Jeff Mauro know Bobbys strengths and his weaknesses. Their goal: Pick the chef who has the skills to take down Bobby Flay in his own arena. The winning chef gets to challenge Bobby with his or her surprise signature dish. If Bobby goes down, the winner can tell the world, "I beat Bobby Flay!"

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship
programme.desc: In Food Networks series Kids Baking Championship, hosts and judges Duff Goldman and Valerie Bertinelli will lead eight talented kid bakers through challenges designed to find the most-impressive and creative young baker. In each challenge the contestants, ranging in age from 10 to 13, will be tested on their baking skills and originality as they whip up delectable desserts, including creative cakes, mouthwatering cookies and pastries.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri finds funky flavour with waffles in Syracuse, NY, mushroom asada in Allston, MA, and queso and mojo pork-topped tots in Minneapolis.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieris catching up with a top taco spot in Phoenix, a real-deal Italian joint in Boston, and a "meatless" butcher in Minneapolis.

programme.title: Alex Vs America
programme.desc: Brave and talented chefs attempt to take down Iron Chef Alex Guarnaschelli, the most feared and accomplished competition cook in America. Chef Alex goes up against three chefs in two rounds of cooking, and anyone -- even Alex -- can be sent home after a blind tasting by the judges. Each chef hails from a different state, but they all share the same culinary specialty and drive to beat Alex for ultimate bragging rights and $15,000.

programme.title: Cutthroat Kitchen: Knives Out
programme.desc: Just how far is a chef willing to go to win a cooking competition? Hosted by Brian Malarkey, Cutthroat Kitchen: Knives Out hands four chefs each $25,000 and the opportunity to spend that money on helping themselves or sabotaging their competitors. Ingredients will be thieved, utensils destroyed and valuable time on the clock lost when the chefs compete to cook delicious dishes while also having to outplot the competition. Nothing is out of bounds when money changes hands and we see just how far chefs will go to ensure they have the winning dish.

programme.title: Spring Baking Championship
programme.desc: American cooking competition that sees aspirational bakers producing a variety of sweet and savoury treats in the hopes of taking home the $50,000 grand prize. Join the contestants as theyre pushed to their limits in a series of intense heats; each designed to showcase their culinary skills and test their ability to produce outstanding baked goods. With the competition heating up and a panel of experienced professional judges to impress, which baker will reign supreme and wholl be the first to crumble?

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is a cookbook author who combines her country lifestyle with her Jewish and Chinese heritage to create the most delicious new dishes. A former big city girl, Yeh is multi talented, a successful blogger and classically trained musician, its food that ultimately stole her heart. Learn lots of tricks and tips with Yeh as she cooks up her personal favourite recipes for every occasion, from family visits to brunch with the girls to a classic farm supper! This show is an absolute treat.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible
programme.desc: Chef Robert Irvine heads to Delray Beach, Florida, to work with Bobby, the owner of Taverna Trela, in hopes of reviving the flagging clientele. Assisting Chef Robert is the culinary mastermind Jason Giovanni and his sous chef, the swarthy Leonard Persin. Faced with maybe their greatest challenge yet, Chefs Robert and Jason race against the clock to save the restaurant from falling into the hands of rival chef, Jane "the Gain Goblin" Frantzen.

programme.title: Battle of the Brothers
programme.desc: Three chefs have made it to the finale for their chance to take over a Voltaggio restaurant, but only two can face off for the grand prize. All that stands in their way is guest judge Iron Chef Alex Guarnaschelli. In the epic three-course challenge to end it all, Michael and Bryan Voltaggio join forces with the two finalists to create an unforgettable meal and crown the series champion.

programme.title: Supermarket Stakeout
programme.desc: Supermarket Stakeout is an American cooking competition TV series presented by chef Alex Guarnaschelli. Every participant of the show has a budget of $500 to purchase the groceries from the customers of a nearby supermarket, and create dishes later out of it. In each round the host assigns the theme of the dish to cook. The chef whose dish is judged the least satisfactory is eliminated from the competition, and the final chef remaining gets a prize of $10,000.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship
programme.desc: In Food Networks series Kids Baking Championship, hosts and judges Duff Goldman and Valerie Bertinelli will lead eight talented kid bakers through challenges designed to find the most-impressive and creative young baker. In each challenge the contestants, ranging in age from 10 to 13, will be tested on their baking skills and originality as they whip up delectable desserts, including creative cakes, mouthwatering cookies and pastries.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods
programme.desc: Travel and cuisine documentary series, hosted by famous Andrew Zimmern, American culinary expert, chef, restaurateur and television personality and spin-off series of Bizarre Foods, focuses on classic, iconic foods (not bizarre like in the original series) from some well-known destinations- moussaka and real Greek yogurt from Athens, sweet macarons and crepes from Paris, Italian gelato, gooey fondue to Swiss chocolate from Zurich, mile-high pastrami sandwiches and bagels from NYC, and many other legendary foods. The show will explore where these dishes came from, how theyre prepared, and the best way to enjoy them. Andrew will also discover some secrets and interesting stories behind these epic meals.

programme.title: Ciao House
programme.desc: The seven chefs meet a butcher whose family business is over three centuries old! Alex Guarnaschelli and Gabe Bertaccini task two teams with creating a menu based around the prized Bistecca alla Fiorentina, which tests their skills like never before.

programme.title: News reports
programme.desc: The program delivers comprehensive reports on current events, providing viewers with detailed information on politics, society, economy, and culture. Episodes present facts clearly and objectively, offering analysis and context to help audiences understand complex issues. By following the program, viewers stay informed about local and global developments, gain insight into ongoing events, and make sense of important news with accuracy and reliability.

programme.title: FreeDOM
programme.desc: Viewers follow the transformation of homes, renovation projects, and community initiatives in an engaging and informative way. Each episode highlights practical solutions, creative design ideas, and real-life stories, offering inspiration for personal living spaces. The program combines entertainment with useful insights, helping audiences discover innovative ways to enhance comfort, style, and functionality at home.

programme.title: Art. In The Shadow of War
programme.desc: In the midst of war, where silence and destruction often prevail, art rises as a powerful form of expression. This documentary series explores how artists navigate conflict, using creativity to document reality, preserve culture, and inspire hope. Through intimate stories, studio moments, and reflections on loss and resilience, it reveals how art becomes both a refuge and a form of resistance. Blending personal journeys with broader cultural context, the series highlights the enduring strength of human creativity in the darkest of times.

programme.title: Authors of War
programme.desc: Authors of War examines the powerful role writers and journalists play in shaping how conflicts are understood. Through letters, memoirs, reports and historical works, the series explores how those who documented wars helped preserve the experiences of soldiers and civilians. Each episode revisits major conflicts through the eyes of war correspondents, historians and authors whose words captured the realities of battle, the emotions of those involved and the lasting impact of war on societies and collective memory

programme.title: Historical Facts
programme.desc: Viewers are taken on a journey through history, uncovering fascinating events, influential personalities, and cultural achievements that shaped societies across the globe. The program encourages curiosity, enhances historical knowledge, and offers a richer perspective on how past events continue to influence the present and future.

programme.title: Fuhrer 2.0
programme.desc: Is history repeating itself before our eyes? A documentary examines the shocking similarities between two dictators, Adolf Hitler and Vladimir Putin. Despite a 66-year age gap, their methods are identical: from the suppression of freedoms and nationalist propaganda to bloody wars of aggression. The filmmakers explore how childhood trauma and domestic violence shaped the characters of future tyrants, and compare their military strategies—from the devastation of World War II to modern aggression in Ukraine, Georgia, and Syria. A deep psychological portrait of those who brought the world to the brink of disaster.

programme.title: FreeDOM
programme.desc: Viewers follow the transformation of homes, renovation projects, and community initiatives in an engaging and informative way. programme.title: Those who care
programme.desc: Over 4,000 official volunteers and thousands of those who came at the call of their hearts: the program "Nebyduzhi" reveals the face of foreign volunteering in Ukraine. This is a story about people who exchanged foreign comfort for risky work for the sake of supporting Ukrainians. For them, help has no visas or borders, and saving lives - both military and civilian - has become the main mission.

programme.title: True Story
programme.desc: Real-life stories are explored through authentic accounts of personal experiences, challenges, and accomplishments. Each episode presents engaging and emotional narratives from everyday life as well as extraordinary situations. Viewers gain a deeper understanding of human resilience, emotions, and the diversity of life, making the program both inspiring and informative.

programme.title: Art. In The Shadow of War
programme.desc: In the midst of war, where silence and destruction often prevail, art rises as a powerful form of expression. This documentary series explores how artists navigate conflict, using creativity to document reality, preserve culture, and inspire hope. programme.title: Fuhrer 2.0
programme.desc: Is history repeating itself before our eyes? A documentary examines the shocking similarities between two dictators, Adolf Hitler and Vladimir Putin. Despite a 66-year age gap, their methods are identical: from the suppression of freedoms and nationalist propaganda to bloody wars of aggression. The filmmakers explore how childhood trauma and domestic violence shaped the characters of future tyrants, and compare their military strategies—from the devastation of World War II to modern aggression in Ukraine, Georgia, and Syria. A deep psychological portrait of those who brought the world to the brink of disaster.

programme.title: Alarum
programme.desc: Silvestrs Stallone – spiegu trillerī. Precēts spiegu pāris slēpjas no varas iestādēm, kas meklē pazudušu cieto disku.

programme.title: Mēs visi svešinieki
programme.desc: Šajā aizkustinošajā, provokatīvajā stāstā par mīlestību, ģimeni un pagātnes rēgiem Ādams dzīvo vientuļu dzīvi, taču kādu vakaru viņu apciemo noslēpumains kaimiņš, kurš uzjundī sen apspiestas jūtas un atmiņas. Abu starpā rodas saikne un nenoliedzamas simpātijas, un Ādams nonāk savā bērnības mājā, kurā 30 gadus pēc nāves šķietami dzīvo viņa vecāki.

programme.title: Balerīna
programme.desc: Slepkava, apmācīta Ruska Roma organizācijas tradīcijās, dodas atriebt tēva nāvi.

programme.title: Ledus laikmets 4: Kontinentu dreifs
programme.desc: Skrats netīšām izraisa kontinentālu kataklizmu, kuras rezultātā Menijs tiek nošķirts no Elijas un Persikas. Viņš atrodas uz aisberga kopā ar Djego, Sidu un Omīti, taču apņemas atgriezties mājās. Pēc šiem satriecošajiem notikumiem Sids satiek sen neredzētus ģimenes locekļus, turklāt draugiem būs jātiek galā ar dažādiem jauniem personāžiem, kuri apņēmušies liegt viņiem atgriezties mājās.

programme.title: Viens pats mājās
programme.desc: Ir pagājis labs laiks kopš Ziemassvētkiem, kad Makkalisteru ģimene, dodoties brīvdienās, pirmo reizi aizmirsa mājās Kevinu. Šos Ziemassvētkus Kevins nolēmis pavadīt sava tēta bagātās draudzenes Natālijas milzīgajā savrupmājā. Taču mierīgais vakars viņam kārtējo reizi izvēršas par īstu piedzīvojumu, jo Natālijas māju svētkos nolēmuši apciemot zagļi. Starp citu - vienam no viņiem ar Kevinu ir kārtojami veci rēķini!

programme.title: Mīluļi apvienojas
programme.desc: Klusā, bet ļoti mūsdienīgā pilsētā Robo notiek kas neredzēts un nedzirdēts. Mērs Frenks ir zaudējis prātu. Viņa plāns neiekļaujas nekādos rāmjos. Tikai paklausieties! Viņam apnikuši cilvēki un dzīvnieki, tāpēc viņš savā prātā perina plānu – visus iedzīvotājus un mājdzīvniekus izdzīt no pilsētas un viņu mājas atdot robotiem! Kad suns bez pajumtes Rodžers uzzina šo jaunumu, viņam visas spalvas saceļas stāvus. Šis Robins Huds daudz laika pavadījis uz ielas, nočiepis dažu labu gardas desas luņķi, lai to atdotu vājākiem dzīvniekiem, un nu jūt, ka mēra plāns pie laba gala nenovedīs. No pilsētas pazudīs dzīvība! Atgriezies no jaukas pastaigas kopā ar daiļo Siāmas kaķenīti Bellu, Rodžers šausmās sastingst. Roboti sagrāvuši viņa vienīgo būdiņu! Mukdams, ko nagi nes, Rodžers piepeši satiek labsirdīgo robotu Bobu, kuram arī mēra nodoms šķiet briesmīgs. Ir jārīkojas! Jāglābjas pašiem un jāglābj citi. Ja nekas netiks darīts, greznā mājdzīvnieku viesnīca būs briesmās. Nenojauzdami nekā ļauna, tajā mitinās daudzi četrkājainie.

programme.title: Lepnā princese
programme.desc: Jaunajam un izskatīgajam karalim Bendžaminam ir pienācis laiks precēties. Viņu savaldzina princeses Karolīnas portrets. Kad princese viņu atraida, karalis, pārģērbies par dārznieku, iekļūst Karolīnas pilī un iekaro viņas sirdi.

programme.title: Rēgu patruļa
programme.desc: Netiešs turpinājums 2013. gada asa sižeta komēdijai. Šoreiz notikumi norisinās 1876. gada Mežonīgajos Rietumos. Pēc neveiksmīga dueļa Šerifs Rojs Pulsifers attopas beigts – viņš nav sajūsmā par šādu pavērsienu, bet viņam dota vēl viena iespēja atgriezties uz zemes ,pievienojoties Rēgu patruļai. Viņa uzdevums – glābt cilvēci no elles.

programme.title: Varenais Ričards
programme.desc: Zvirbulis Ričijs kopš dzimšanas pieņemts stārķu ģimenē, visi viņu ļoti mīl, viņš ātri aug un jūtas kā īsts stārķis. Taču gājputniem stārķiem pienāk laiks lidot uz Āfriku, lai tur ziemotu. Ģimene ir spiesta atklāt Ričijam viņa izcelšanos, jo lidot kopā nedrīkst – grūtajā ceļojumā zvirbulis var iet bojā. Drosminieks negrasās nolaist spārnus un nolemj visiem pierādīt, ka ir īsts stārķis. Ričijs viens pats dodas ceļā, un viņam pievienojas jauni draugi – pūce Olga un papagailis Kiki.

programme.title: Varenais Ričards
programme.desc: Ričards ir jauns zvirbulēns, kuru savā lokā pieņēmusi stārķu ģimene. Viņš pavada ziemu Āfrikas ziemeļos, taču ir pienācis laiks atgriezties mājās. Ričards vēlas vadīt gājputnu kāsi, bet šim uzdevumam tiek izraudzīts viņa pusbrālis Makss. Jaunais putnēns jūtas aizvainots, taču drīz sākas vētrains piedzīvojums. Tirāniskais pāvs Zamano sagūsta Ričarda draugu. Zamano atsakās viņu laist brīvībā, kamēr Ričards neatrisinās mīklu un neatradīs Zamano dārgakmeni.

programme.title: Izbrauciens
programme.desc: Bens Bārbers (Kevins Hārts) gatavojas precēties ar saderināto Andželu (Tika Samptere), kura ir viņa policijas partnera Džeimsa (Aiss Kjūbs) māsa. Policistus nosūta uzdevumā uz Maiami, lai izmeklētu nežēlīgā narkotiku tirgoņa Antonio Poupa (Bendžamins Brats) nodarījumus, par kuru ir zināms, ka tas apgādā visu Maiami ar narkotikām. Viņi apvienojas ar bezkompromisu detektīvi Maju (Olīvija Manna) un dodas pārtraukt Poupa darbību. Spriedze palielinās, tuvojoties Bena un Andželas kāzām.

programme.title: Rozalīna
programme.desc: Ikviens zina stāstu par Romeo un Džuljetu. Taču šajā stāstā iztrūkst kāda svarīga nianse – pirms Džuljetas bija viņas māsīca Rozalīna. Rozalīna ir līdz ausīm iemīlējusies Romeo un ir pārliecināta, ka abi ir kā radīti viens otram. Gadiem ilgi Rozalīna sapņo, kaut Romeo viņu noskūpstītu, un tad tas patiešām notiek! Viss šķiet ideāli, taču tad viņas māsīca Džuljeta pārceļas atpakaļ uz pilsētu un iekaro Romeo sirdi. Un tas vēl nav viss – Rozalīna uzzina par Džuljetas un Romeo pašnāvības plāniem. Vai viņa pagūs abus apturēt?

programme.title: Viņš ir viņa
programme.desc: Ļoti brīva Šekspīra lugas "Divpadsmitā nakts" ekranizācija. Pārvācoties uz citu skolu, Viola maina arī savu izskatu un uzdodas par savu dvīņubrāli Sebastjanu, kurš pats pārcēlies uz Londonu. Taču meitene nemaz nenojauš, ka viņu gaida pārsteigums, – viņa iemīlēsies savā istabas biedrā un skolas karstākajā puisī Djūkā, kura sirds savukārt pieder skaistulei Olīvijai. Taču šī meitene ir pamanījusi Sebastjanu – emocionālo puisi, kādi viņai vienmēr patikuši. Un, kaut arī šķiet, ka nekas nevar būt vēl trakāk, ierodas īstais Sebastjans, kurš nemaz nenojauš, ka viņu aizvieto paša dvīņu māsa!

programme.title: Adaptācija
programme.desc: Pazīstams dramaturgs Čārlijs Kaufmans (Nikolass Keidžs) saņem pasūtījumu uzrakstīt filmas scenāriju pēc grāmatas "Orhideju zaglis" motīviem. Tajā žurnāliste Sūzena Orleāna (Merila Strīpa) apraksta avantūristu Džonu Laroču, kas ir tiesāts par īpašu orhideju zādzību no rezervāta. Nespēdams izdomāt scenārijam adekvātu sižeta noslēgumu Čārlijs piekrīt dvīņubrāļa piedāvājumam izsekot žurnālisti. Izrādās, ka grāmatā aprakstītie notikumi ievērojami atšķiras no realitātes un ziedu zagšanai ir pavisam citi iemesli. Sūzena izrādās iesaistījusies avantūrista Laroča dzīvē vairāk nekā parasta vērotāja no malas.

programme.title: Un kundze
programme.desc: Britu komēdija par līgavu, kura nav gatava pieņemt, ka viņas līgavainis pēkšņi nomirst, un uzstāj, ka viņai tāpat viņš jāaprec, - lai vai kādi būtu sabiedrības uzskati, likumi un tuvāko domas.

programme.title: Eņģeļa krišana
programme.desc: Maiks Benings pilnībā nododas valsts dienestam, viņa galvenais uzdevums – gādāt par ASV prezidenta drošību. Kolēģi, ar kuriem Benings daudzus gadus strādājis plecu pie pleca, viņam neuzticas, tur viņu aizdomās par nodomu nonāvēt valsts galvu. Lai glābtu ne vien savu godu, bet arī dzīvību, Benings ir spiests slēpties un noskaidrot, kas un kāpēc ievilina viņu un prezidentu slazdā.

programme.title: Mazulīte
programme.desc: Augsta līmeņa vadītāja liek uz spēles savu karjeru un ģimeni, kad sāk kaislīgas attiecības ar krietni jaunāku praktikantu.

programme.title: Kungfu panda
programme.desc: Pandumānija turpinās! Kļuvis par varoni, panda Po nu kopā ar saviem draugiem Tīģerieni, Dzērvi, Čūsku, Pērtiķi un Dievlūdzēju aizsargā dzimto ieleju un tās iemītniekus. Taču Po mierīgajai dzīvei tiek pielikts punkts brīdī, kad uzrodas ļaundaris, kurš, liekot lietā noslēpumainu spēku, grib pakļaut Ķīnu. Pandai kopā ar draugiem būs jādodas cauri visai Ķīnai, lai uzveiktu pretinieku.

programme.title: Madagaskara
programme.desc: Lauva Alekss ir Ņujorkas Centrālparka zoodārza karalis. Arī viņa labākie draugi zebra Mārtijs, žirafe Melmens un nīlzirgu meitene Glorija visu dzīvi šajā idilliskajā nebrīvē saņēmuši zoodārza apmeklētāju apbrīnu. Taču Mārtijs klusībā kaļ plānus par bēgšanu, un ar dažu apbrīnojami uzņēmīgu pingvīnu palīdzību viņam izdodas izrauties pasaulē, ko viņš sen sapņojis iepazīt. Alekss, Melmens un Glorija viņam seko, taču tiek notverti un nosūtīti uz Āfriku. Kad pingvīni sabotē kuģa komandu, Alekss, Mārtijs, Melmens un Glorija attopas izskaloti eksotiskās Madagaskaras krastā. Nu četriem ņujorkiešiem nākas izdzīvot savvaļā, un tas ir sasodīti grūti.

programme.title: Bitīte Maija: Medus spēles
programme.desc: Strops satraukti dūc – nupat novākta vasaras medus raža. Varbūt beidzot spiets tiks izraudzīts dalībai Medus spēlēs? Maijas jaukais satraukums zūd, kad viņa uzzina, ka strops nepiedalīsies spēlēs, turklāt puse ražas būs jāatdod spēļu dalībniekiem. Maijai tas šķiet netaisnīgi. Bez stropa karalienes atļaujas viņa grasās lidot uz Zumtropoli pie imperatores un lūgt atļauju piedalīties spēlēs, pārstāvot savu stropu. Cenzdamās pierādīt stropa karalienei, ko bites spēj, Maija apsola gūt uzvaru Medus spēlēs un glābt stropa medu. Karaliene piekrīt, bet atgādina, ka, vedot komandu cīņā, Maijai vispirms jāiemācās uzklausīt citus. Maija piedalās spēlēs kopā ar labāko draugu Villiju un seno biedru vaboļu komandu. Drīz viņa sastop skaudīgo bitīti Vijolīti no Zumtropoles, kura ar viltu cenšas atņemt Maijas komandai uzvaru. Bitītei nākas piedzīvot viltus rūgtumu, taču negodīgā Vijolīte un viņas komanda arī iekuļas ķibelē.

programme.title: Trakās ķepas. Leģenda par Henku
programme.desc: Henks varbūt ir necils suns, taču viņš ir apņēmības pilns kļūt par samuraju. Suņuks dodas uz valsti, kur čum un mudž no kaķiem. Tur Henks satiek nejauko kaķu karavadoni Iku Ču un arī Džimbo, kurš reiz bijis varens samurajs. Džimbo paņem Henku savā paspārnē un iemāca viņam, ko īsti nozīmē būt samurajam. Dzimstot pirmajai īstajai draudzībai starp kaķi un suni, abiem nākas glābt Kakamučo no ļaunā Ika Ču.

programme.title: Blūmu ģimenes stāsts
programme.desc: Sema ir aktīvā dzīvesveida piekritēja, taču ģimenes ceļojumā pa Taizemi notiek nelaime – viņa neveiksmīgi nokrīt no balkona, savaino mugurkaulu un paliek daļēji paralizēta. Semas vīrs, trīs dēli un māte visādi mēģina palīdzēt un uzmundrināt sievieti, kura ir zaudējusi dzīvesprieku un slīgst arvien dziļāk depresīvā noskaņojumā. Pēkšņi mājas pagalmā uzrodas ievainots žagatas mazulis, kuru ģimene adoptē un nosauc par Pingvīnu. Neviens gan nebija iedomājies, ka tieši Pingvīns būs tas, kurš palīdzēs Semai atkal saskatīt dzīvei jēgu un atgūt optimismu.

programme.title: Ķieģeli pa ķieģelītim
programme.desc: Animācijas filma "Lego" klucīšu stilā par Farela Viljamsa dzīvi. Filmā, kurā galvenās lomas ierunājis pats Farels Viljamss (Pharrell Williams), kā arī Kendriks Lamārs (Kendrick Lamar) un Džastins Timberleiks (Justin Timberlake), ķieģelīti pa ķieģelītim tiek pārskatīta mākslinieka karjera.

programme.title: Zaķu skola: Misija Olas
programme.desc: Īsi pirms Lieldienām svinīgā rituālā maģiskā Zelta ola palīdz noskaidrot zaķu čempionus. Un pirmo reizi zaķu skolas vēsturē izvēlēts arī pilsētas zaķis - un tas ir Makss! Vaļoties Maksam vairs itin nemaz nav laika, jo viņam kopā ar Lieldienu zaķa draugiem jāpilnveido savas prasmes. Tomēr pirms paša pirmā treniņa zaķu maģiskā spēka avots Zelta ola kļūst melna. Pie vainas ir bandas vadonis Leo, kurš nevēlas, lai Lieldienas notiku. Ko nu?!

programme.title: Šreks
programme.desc: Kādā tālā zemē ļaunais valdnieks izraida uz mežu visus pasaku varoņus, lai zeme būtu tikpat garlaicīga kā pats valdnieks. Lielā milža Šreka mājvieta pārtop par bēgļu nometni. Tāpēc viņš nolemj atrast bargo galdnieku un pārliecināt, lai viņš atļauj zemes iemītniekiem atgriezties mājās. Valdnieks piekrīt, bet ar vienu nosacījumu - Šrekam jāatrod un jāatved daiļā princese Fiona, kuru ļaunais valdnieks nolēmis apprecēt, lai kļūtu par karali. Filma dublēta latviešu valodā..

programme.title: Mīluļu slepenā dzīve
programme.desc: Makss (Luiss Sīkejs) ir enerģisks un sajūsmināts Džeka Rasela terjers, kurš dzīvo Manhetenas dzīvoklī kopā ar īpašnieci Keitiju (Elija Kempere). Taču viņa laimīgā dzīve pārtrūkst, kad saimniece pieņem jaunu suni Grāfu (Ēriks Stounstrīts). Makss apņemas atgūt saimnieces uzmanību tikai sev un mēģina Grāfu atstāt kādā sānielā, taču viņus ielenc kaķu banda, kuru vada Ozons (Stīvs Kūgans). Viņi tik tikko izglābj savas dzīvības, kad nākas saskarties ar pamesto dzīvnieku armijas niknumu apburošā, bet psihiski nelīdzsvarotā truša Sniegapikas (Kevins Hārts) vadībā. Šis ir Ņujorkas piedzīvojums, kurš liek Maksam un Grāfam izvērtēt savu sacensību un mēģināt izjaukt Sniegapikas atriebes plānu pret visiem dzīvnieku īpašniekiem Ņujorkā.

programme.title: Viens pats mājās
programme.desc: ASV Valsts Aizsardzības dienestam ir nozagta slepena mikroshēma. Noziedznieki cer to pārdot un nopelnīt miljoniem dolāru, taču vērtīgā prece nejauši ir nokļuvusi rotaļlietu mašīnā, kas patlaban atrodas kādā mājīgā Čikāgas savrupnamā. Noziedznieki dodas mikroshēmu atgūt. Ceļā viņiem stājas bīstams pretinieks Alekss – astoņgadīgs puišelis, kuram netrūkst izdomas un kurš ir viens pats mājās.

programme.title: Sliktais leitnants
programme.desc: Glābjot pēc viesuļvētras Katrīna cietuma kamerā iesprostotu cietumnieku, Jaunorleānas policijas seržants Terenss Makdona ieguva apbalvojumu, paaugstinājumu par leitnantu, muguras ievainojumu, kas sāpēs visu atlikušo dzīvi, un pieeju sāpes remdējošām zālēm. Reiz Terenss bija tiešām labs policists, bet nu viena nepareiza izvēle ved pie nākamās, līdz beidzot ne tikai Terensa karjera, bet arī viņa paša dzīvība izrādās briesmās.

programme.title: Arkādija
programme.desc: Nikolass Keidžs atveido tēvu, kurš pasaules gala laikā, nomaļā lauku sētā, kopā ar saviem dvīņu puikām cīnās par izdzīvošanu.

programme.title: Jauns sākums
programme.desc: Greta un viņas draugs Deivs ir muzikanti un dziesmu autori, kopā jau ilgus gadus kopš koledžas laikiem. Brīdī, kad Deivs saņem piedāvājumu ierakstīt albumu no lielas ierakstu kompānijas, viņi pārvācas uz dzīvi Ņujorkā. Jauniegūtās slavas savaldzināts, Deivs pamet Gretu un uzsāk savu jauno mūziķa karjeru. Gretas dzīvē pozitīvu pavērsienu ienes nejauša satikšanās ar Denu, izbijušu ierakstu kompānijas menedžeri. Brīdī, kad Dens ierauga Gretu muzicējam nomaļā pilsētas klubā, viņu vienā mirklī apbur meitenes muzikālais talants un šarms. Līdz ar šo nejaušo sastapšanos abu dzīves ir nesaraujami saistītas, ļaujot sadziedēt brūces un sasniegt mērķus gan profesionālajā karjerā, gan privātajā dzīvē. Jauns dzīves sākums izstāstīts uz Ņujorkas vasaras fona.

programme.title: Bestsellers
programme.desc: Untumains pensionēts rakstnieks negribīgi sāk piedalīties savas pēdējās grāmatas veicināšanas kampaņā, lai izpalīdzētu jaunai izdevējai.

programme.title: Futbols: Bundesliga. Bayern - Stuttgart
programme.desc: Germany has the most attended football league in the world, in the Bundesliga. We bring these authentic fab experiences to your living room with all the key moments of the 2019-20 season, to ensure that your appetite for German football is well and truly met. The likes of Borussia Dortmund and Bayern Munich are met with stern competition this season, as RB Leipzig look to build on their third-placed finish from last season. This programme brings all the games of the german top-flight into one place, so that you can easily catch up with the weeks action. As we reach the business end-of-the-season, watch the victors and losers dictate the final table. With relegation spots and Champions League places yet to be decided, it promises to be a rather exciting conclusion for all those concerned.

programme.title: NBA. Play-offs: Knicks - Hawks
programme.desc: The National Basketball Association composes of thirty teams across North America for men who are professional in this specific sport. Due to its popularity, this is one of four major professional sport leagues available in the United States of America and Canada. Furthermore, research suggests that it is widely considered to be the premier mens basketball league in the world. Legends of this particular sport include Kobe Bryant, Michael Jordan and Kareem Abdul-Jabbar.

programme.title: LaLiga. Real Madrid - Alaves
programme.desc: La Liga (The Campeonato Nacional de Liga de Primera Division) is the mens top professional football division of the Spanish football league system. It is administered by the National Professional Football League and has 20 contestants, with the three lowest-placed teams at the end of each season relegated to the Segunda Division and replaced by the top two teams and a play-off winner in that division. Nine teams have become champions, Real Madrid has got the title 33 times and FC Barcelona 26 times. La Liga is one of the most popular professional sports leagues in the world and the top league in Europe over the last five years.

programme.title: UFC. Gilbert Burns-Mike Malott
programme.desc: Martial Arts based TV programme. UFC stands for the Ultimate Fighting Championship which is an American mixed martial arts (MMA) promotion company based in Las Vegas that is owned by William Morris Endeavour.The purpose of UFC fighting was to establish the most effective martial art in a contest that had no weight classes and minimal rules that were as follows: no biting, hair pulling, groin shots and eye gouging. Legendary fighters well known for their ability to win in UFC fighting are Anderson Silva, Brock Lesnar, Connor McGregor and Ken Shamrock. Womens MMA has seen Ronda Rousey defend her title from 2012 to 2015 before she was defeated by Holly Holm another belt holder in more than one martial art.

programme.title: Basketbols: Eirolīga. Zalgiris Kaunas - Paris
programme.desc: The EuroLeague is the top-tier European professional basketball club competition since 2000. The competition replaced the FIBA EuroLeague (which was previously called the FIBA European Champions Cup, or simply the European Cup), which had been run by FIBA since 1958. Starting from 2010/2011 season the tournament is named Turkish Airlines Euroleague, due to a sponsorship contract of Turkish Airlines with EuroLeague, and in 2013 the contract was prolonged to 2020. The tournament is aired in 199 countries of the world. The current EuroLeague structure is made up of 16 teams, which each play each other twice, once at home and once away, in a double round robin league regular season, each team plays 30 games. The top 8 placed teams at the end of the regular season advance to playoffs, each plays a 5 game playoff series against a single opponent. The winners of each playoff series advance to the Final Four held in a predetermined city for two days. The Final Four features two semifinals, a third place game, and the championship game, all on the same weekend.

Design Down Under
programme.desc: Husband and wife design build team, Richie Morris and Georgia Ezra, create one-of-a-kind, modern designs and bespoke spaces for their clients in Melbourne, Australia while juggling their thriving businesses and family of four.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous
programme.desc: Dave and Jenny Marrs embrace small-town America by renovating classic homes in Bentonville, Arkansas. The resourceful couple preserves and transforms the areas historic houses into charming, updated masterpieces for young, potential buyers looking for a slower-paced lifestyle.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: Most people only fantasize about living on an island, but well prove that an Island Life is possible for anyone. Tropical dreamers will be shown island properties that fit into any budget, from ultra-affordable to totally outrageous. Well follow everyday families is search of their own slice of paradise, and prove that fantasy can be reality.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: A young marketing professional is ready to buy her first place in Long Beach, NY. She grew up visiting the island town with her family, and shes getting help from her mom to find a condo with a pool and gym.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: Recent lottery winners look for their perfect dream house in this "House Hunters"-inspired reality show. David Bromstad takes recent lottery winners on over-the-top house hunts for their new dream homes. Whether they win hundreds of thousands or hundreds of millions, lucky lottery winners everywhere are jumping headfirst into the real estate market. Will they spend all their winnings on an extravagant mansion or settle for a humble sound investment? Find out what happens when average Americans set out to find "My Lottery Dream Home".

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: Recent lottery winners look for their perfect dream house in this "House Hunters"-inspired reality show. David Bromstad takes recent lottery winners on over-the-top house hunts for their new dream homes. Whether they win hundreds of thousands or hundreds of millions, lucky lottery winners everywhere are jumping headfirst into the real estate market. Will they spend all their winnings on an extravagant mansion or settle for a humble sound investment? Find out what happens when average Americans set out to find "My Lottery Dream Home".

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Attempting to bring families dreams come to life, but on a budget, Beachfront Bargain Hunt shows that you dont have to be a millionaire if you want to live a life by the sea! Narrated by John Beach, this show follows a number of couples, families and people looking just for themselves exploring various beachfronts in USA, looking for homes that wont break the bank. Ensuring each person gets what they want, they are introduced to a number of properties that meet their ultimate dream home in the hopes that they will indeed find the one. With 101 episodes, Beachfront Bargain Hunt introduces you to the life that can be led, without breaking to bank, to live a life by the sea!

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: American reality series following host Suzanne Whang on her quest to help people relocate in search of their dream home. Follow the individuals, couples and families in an international search for their perfect property, exploring a stunning selection of homes chosen just for them. With three potential candidates to choose from, join them as they try and make the difficult decision to start a new life abroad. Revisit the new homeowners at the end of each episode to see how their properties have developed and how life has changed for them since the move.

programme.title: House Hunters

programme.title: Flip or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek is a self-proclaimed real estate genius with determination and drive. Christina is Tareks picture-perfect wife, who Tareks friends still cant believe he landed. In each episode of "Flip or Flop", Tarek and Christina flip a new property. From the nail-biting purchase at auction, to the frustrating renovations and maddening showings, to the giddy acceptance of an offer, well follow along as these two relatively novice flippers try their hand at the toughest game in town. From purchase to resale, weaving their personal lives within the story of the flip. From paying cash, sight unseen, for a property at auction, through the hapless remodeling process, to the frantic sale, this young couple is putting everything they have into this venture.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: Most people only fantasize about living on an island, but well prove that an Island Life is possible for anyone. Tropical dreamers will be shown island properties that fit into any budget, from ultra-affordable to totally outrageous. Well follow everyday families is search of their own slice of paradise, and prove that fantasy can be reality.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: A couple with a connection to Marthas Vineyard is eager to move there and start building memories with their children. She has her heart set on a home with New England charm, while he hopes to be within walking distance to town.

programme.title: Ugliest House In America
programme.desc: Potraga za ružnim se završava dok Reta otkriva pobednika! Pobednička kuća dobija renoviranje vredno 150.000 dolara od dizajnerke Alison Viktorije.

programme.title: Neighborhood Watch
programme.desc: Od neočekivanih neuspeha do dobrih namera koje krenu po zlu, život je najzabavniji kada ništa ne ide po planu.

programme.title: Living Aloha
programme.desc: Kamohai and Tristyn take on an ambitious project as they renovate a five-unit compound on Kalama Street. The rundown property needs a ton of work, and in Phase One of the renovation, they work to turn this filthy duplex into something truly special.

programme.title: Living Aloha
programme.desc: In the second phase of their ambitious renovation, Kamohai and Tristyn tackle the remaining three units of their Kalama Street compound; theyre hoping for a value high enough to keep the property in the family.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Attempting to bring families dreams come to life, but on a budget, Beachfront Bargain Hunt shows that you dont have to be a millionaire if you want to live a life by the sea! Narrated by John Beach, this show follows a number of couples, families and people looking just for themselves exploring various beachfronts in USA, looking for homes that wont break the bank. Ensuring each person gets what they want, they are introduced to a number of properties that meet their ultimate dream home in the hopes that they will indeed find the one. With 101 episodes, Beachfront Bargain Hunt introduces you to the life that can be led, without breaking to bank, to live a life by the sea!

programme.title: Holmes Family Rescue
programme.desc: After purchasing their bungalow, homeowners are left defeated and overwhelmed following a year of endless leaks and shocking electrical issues. Mike, Sherry, and Michael step in to help and must deal with insufficient waterproofing and dangerous wiring.

programme.title: Help! I Wrecked My House
programme.desc: American home improvement series. Presenter Jasmine Roth visits the homes of DIY catastrophes to restore them back to a liveable space. Jasmine brings in the professionals to rescue these renovations-gone-wrong and helps homeowners realise their propertys full potential. With half-demolished houses, unfinished floors and plumbing nightmares: these refurbishment mishaps are on a monumental scale. Luckily, with expertise, hard work and vision, Jasmine and her team can hopefully transform these DIY disasters into something beautiful that their owners will love.
