programme.title: Latvijas Loto izlozes
programme.desc: Latvijas Loto izlozes.

programme.title: Kas notiek Latvijā?
programme.desc: Diskusijas un intervijas par sabiedrībai nozīmīgām norisēm. Vada žurnālists Jānis Domburs.

programme.title: Nakts ziņas
programme.desc: Vēlo vakaru televīzijas ziņu programma – visaptverošs dienas nozīmīgāko nacionālo un starptautisko norišu atspoguļojums, padziļināta svarīgāko notikumu analīze. Īsi un kodolīgi par svarīgāko! Raidījuma vadītāji: Ilze Vēbere, Laura Vonda, Ilze Dobele, Jānis Geste.

programme.title: Sporta ziņas
programme.desc: Katru dienu pēc "Panorāmas".

programme.title: Laika ziņas
programme.desc: Jaunākie laika apstākļi un precīzākās prognozes Latvijai un Eiropai, ziņas par interesantām dabas parādībām un brīdinājumi par īpaši vērā ņemamiem hidrometeoroloģiskajiem apstākļiem. Vadītāji: Toms Bricis, Ilze Skudra, Ramona Salmiņa.

programme.title: Lielās patiesības
programme.desc: Dizainere Baiba Ladiga-Kobajaši un arhitekts Reidži Kobajaši ir pāris, kuri apvieno dažādus jaņ un iņ aspektus. Arī - latvisko un japānisko. Pēc vairākiem Šanhajā pavadītiem gadiem Baiba un Reidži ir pārcēlušies uz dzīvi Latvijā. Sarunā ar raidījuma vadītāju Ilmāru Latkovski - par to, kā skatījumu uz dzīvi un vērtībām ietekmē gan daudzmiljonu lielās pilsētas, gan salīdzinoši mierīgā dzīve Latvijā, par saistību starp latvisko un japānisko. Pārbaudīsim arī dažas atziņas par Japānu, kas izteiktas E. I. Siliņa eseju grāmatā "Lielo patiesību meklējumi".

programme.title: Ielas garumā
programme.desc: Aprīļa mēnesis raidījumam "Ielas garumā" paies Dobelē. Sākām ar Dobeles pili, bet turpinām Pļavas ielas terasē pie Bērzes upes un Dzirnavu ielā, kas sākas otrpus upei agrākajā Dobeles muižas teritorijā. Pļavas ielu ierīkojis un pirmo māju uzcēlis Jānis Ilmers, kuram starpkaru laikā tur atradusies vadmalas krāsotava. Dzirnavu ielas stāsti lielākoties saistās ar skolu un skolotājiem, jo bērni tur mācījušies vismaz trīs dažādās ēkās un turpat tuvumā mituši arī skolotāji. Dzejniece, dobelniece Inese Zandere vēsturiskus faktus un emocionālas atmiņas ievijusi savos dzejoļos.

programme.title: Aizliegtais paņēmiens
programme.desc: Lai uzzinātu par kāda notikuma patiesajiem apstākļiem vai iesaistīto personu nodomiem, raidījuma "Aizliegtais paņēmiens" komanda informācijas iegūšanai izmanto visdažādākos izmeklējošās žurnālistikas paņēmienus un žanrus – eksperimentus, testus, provokācijas, padziļinātus pētījumus, arī anonīmas intervijas. Žurnālisti padziļināti pēta un skatītājiem atklāj sociālpolitiskus tematus, kas ne vienmēr tiek izcelti citos medijos. Raidījums atklāj un atmasko, atsevišķos gadījumos sauc pie atbildības iesaistītās personas, norāda uz likumu nepilnībām, aicina mainīt pastāvošo kārtību, ja tā ir pretrunā sabiedrības interesēm. Raidījumu vada LTV Ziņu dienesta žurnālists Guntis Bojārs.

programme.title: Tāpēc, ka es esmu Aivars Līdaks. Atjaunotā versija
programme.desc: Aivaram Līdakam ir 12 gadu un ne pārāk garš augums, bet viņa sapnis ir lielais basketbols. Vasaras brīvdienās Aivars neatlaidīgi trenējas un ar savu gribasspēku aizrauj arī citus pusaudžus, bet pats sasniedz šķietami neiespējamo – mačā ar sporta skolas basketbolistiem tieši Aivaru atzīst par labāko spēlētāju.

programme.title: Aculiecinieks
programme.desc: 13 minūšu gari televīzijas stāsti vēsta par notikumiem un Latvijā īpašiem cilvēkiem, aptverot vēsturiskus, zinātnes, izglītības, pilsētas, lauku un daudzus citus tematus.

programme.title: Zinātnes noslēpumi
programme.desc: Dažādas mūsu ikdienā ierastas darbības un notikumi, izskaidroti no zinātnes viedokļa.

programme.title: Province
programme.desc: Jura Pumpiņa dzimtā puse ir Balgale. Taču viņam nebija lemts tur uzaugt, jo viņš bija bērns vienā no tām ģimenēm, kuras izsūtīja 1949. gadā. Pēc atgriešanās viņiem vairs nebija savu tēva māju, jo tur jau dzīvoja sveši ļaudis, kolhoznieki. No Sibīrijas Jurim palika krievu valoda, jo latviešu mēle bija jāmācās gandrīz no jauna, un runas defekts - vecāko brāli bērnībā izsūtījumā sabadīja bullis, viņš sāka raustīt valodu, un Jurim, brāli atdarinot, tas pielipa. Sešdesmitajos un septiņdesmitajos gados Juris no darbiem brīvajā laikā iesaistījās leģendārajā "Rīgas pantomīmā", piedzīvojot šī amatierkolektīva ziedu laikus. Un deviņdesmito sākumā tēva mājas beidzot tika atgūtas. Juris joprojām nav pārdevis ne pēdu savas senču zemes - nepārdot ir viņa goda lieta. Tāpat kā goda lieta ir arī būt par zvaniķi Balgales baznīcā un par tiesnesi novusa mačos.

programme.title: Kultūrdeva
programme.desc: Raidījumā "Kultūrdeva" viesosies aktieris un režisors Mārtiņš Meiers, kurš Dailes teātrī uzvedis izrādi bērniem "Runcis zābakos", kā arī Latvijas Spēļu izstrādātāju asociācijas valdes priekšsēdētāja Madara Āboliņa un Ekonomikas un kultūras augstskolas datorspēļu dizaina pasniedzējs Aleksandrs Priedītis.

programme.title: Vides fakti
programme.desc: Raidījums par norisēm dabā un apkārtējā vidē. "Vides fakti" sniedz informāciju par sezonālām norisēm dabā un dzīvnieku pasaulē, par vides aktualitātēm, par videi draudzīgu dzīvesveidu, par aktuālām cilvēka un vides attiecībām ārpus Latvijas robežām. Raidījumā "Vides fakti" ir skatāmi arī piedzīvojumu sižeti par aktīvā tūrisma iespējām Latvijā, kā arī īsfilmas par neparastiem ceļojumiem pasaulē.

programme.title: Pasaules panorāma
programme.desc: Globālo ziņu laikmetā notikums Āzijā vai Amerikas kontinentā jau rīt var mainīt dzīvi Eiropā, bet lēmums, kas pieņemts Rīgā – atbalsoties visā pasaulē. "Pasaules panorāma" piedāvā neatkarīgas un uzticamas ziņas, atspoguļojot un analizējot ārpolitikas aktualitātes, kā arī sarunas ar politologiem, ārpolitikas ekspertiem, pasaulē pazīstamām personībām par svarīgāko Baltijā un Ziemeļvalstīs, citviet Eiropā, kā arī visā pasaulē. Raidījumu vada LTV Ziņu dienesta ārzemju ziņu redaktori Toms Pastors un Ina Strazdiņa.

programme.title: Krustpunktā
programme.desc: Visvairāk klausītais Latvijas radio raidījums "Krustpunktā" redzams arī Latvijas televīzijas ēterā. Ne tiešraidē, bet ar nelielu nobīdi, iespējams sekot līdzi gan aktuālajām intervijām, gan klausītāju uzdotajiem jautājumiem un amatpersonu atbildēm.

programme.title: Labākais no Euromaxx
programme.desc: Deutsche Welle žurnāls

programme.title: Kas notiek Latvijā?
programme.desc: Diskusijas un intervijas par sabiedrībai nozīmīgām norisēm. Vada žurnālists Jānis Domburs.

programme.title: Sporta studija
programme.desc: "Mūsu uzņemtais virziens izsakāms neformālā sauklī "sports sabiedrībai!". Šis virziens tika uzsākts jau iepriekš ar "Tautas sporta" sižetu sērijām un sporta laukumu kampaņām. Turpmāk LTV Tautas sporta sižeti būs tradicionāla "Sporta studijas" sastāvdaļa. "Sporta Studiju" vadīs rūdītie sporta žurnālisti Dāvids Ernštreits un Reinis Ošenieks, kā arī jaunās sporta žurnālistikas zvaigznes Andris Auziņš, Matīss Timofejevs un Raimonds Gekišs. "Sporta studijas" aktualitātēm sekojiet https://www.facebook.com/LTVSportaStudija

programme.title: Daudz laimes, jubilār!
programme.desc: Januss Johansons, Valmieras teātra aktieris, rīdzinieks ar latviešu un igauņu saknēm, mūsu kultūrvēsturē ir daudz vairāk nekā tikai skatuves mākslinieks Januss ir stratēģis, vīrs ar redzējumu, saišu sējējs ne tikai starp latviešu un igauņu kultūru, starpnacionālu projektu veidotājs, tulkotājs - ideju viņam nekad nav trūcis. Januss allaž bijis arī sociāli aktīvs vīrs - Atmodas laikos kūrējis Baltijas ceļu posmā Cēsis-Valmiera, aktīvi iestājies par aktieru profesionālo stabilitāti, būdams sava teātra arodbiedrības līderis, ticis ievēlēts par Valmieras pilsētas domes deputātu. Johansons ir arī Latvijas profesionālo aktieru apvienības vadītājs. Valmieras teātra mājas lapā par aktieri teikts: "Janusam Johansonam ir trīs dēli un seši mazbērni. Un nepārejošs dzīves spars. Nedomājot par sekām, viņš ies un bļaus, un karos. Daudzi latvieši stāvētu klusu, bet viņš kā karstasinīgs igaunis aizstāvēs savu lietu līdz galam." Pats Johansons gan smaidot nokomentējis: "Tulkošana, aktieru apvienība - tas ir tikai darbs, pārējo laiku aizņem dzīve - teātris.".

programme.title: Latvijas Sirdsdziesma
programme.desc: Latvijas Sirdsdziesma ir sirsnīgi muzikāls raidījums, kurā tiek atspoguļotas tautā vispopulārākās latviešu mūzikas dzīves norises šī vārda visplašākajā nozīmē.

programme.title: Kultūršoks
programme.desc: Kultūra ir ne vien māksla, bet arī nauda, projekti, ražošana un gan radoši, gan postoši konflikti. Par kultūrvides problēmām un šokējošām atklāsmēm — raidījums "Kultūršoks".

programme.title: Kultūrdeva
programme.desc: Raidījumā "Kultūrdeva" viesosies aktieris un režisors Mārtiņš Meiers, kurš Dailes teātrī uzvedis izrādi bērniem "Runcis zābakos", kā arī Latvijas Spēļu izstrādātāju asociācijas valdes priekšsēdētāja Madara Āboliņa un Ekonomikas un kultūras augstskolas datorspēļu dizaina pasniedzējs Aleksandrs Priedītis.

programme.title: Eiropa fokusā
programme.desc: Deutsche Welle žurnāls

programme.title: Rīta Panorāma
programme.desc: Enerģisks un iedvesmojošs sākums jaunai dienai! Ieskats gaidāmās dienas notikumos Latvijā un pasaulē, kultūras, izklaides un sporta ziņas, laika prognoze. Arī atskats uz aizvadītās dienas notikumiem, pievēršot uzmanību to attīstībai nakts laikā. Aizrautīgas sarunas ar viesiem un skanīgi muzikālie priekšnesumi. Raidījumu vada Gusts Kikusts, Sigurds Siliņš, Karīna Rubene, Danuta Juste, sporta ziņas lasa Reinis Ošenieks, Raimonds Gekišs, laika ziņas – Ilze Skudra, Ilze Golubeva, Toms Bricis.

programme.title: Šodienas jautājums
programme.desc: No pirmdienas līdz ceturtdienai 20:35 LTV1 demonstrē diskusiju raidījumu "Šodienas jautājums", kurā tiek analizēts un skaidrots kāds no attiecīgās dienas svarīgākajiem notikumiem. Koncentrēti, neieslīgstot liekvārdībā, raidījuma dalībnieki runā tiešām par būtiskāko! Operatīvi reaģējot uz aktuālajiem dienas notikumiem, studijā tiešraidē tiekas dažādu jomu eksperti un politiķi.

programme.title: Province
programme.desc: "Province" – tie ir valsts bēniņi. Tā ir kā savdabīga pasaule, kam ikdienā mēs, viesistabu un guļamistabu apdzīvotāji, nepievēršam daudz uzmanības. Laiks šeit rit pēc citiem likumiem. Tas atnāk gandrīz tikpat ātri, bet aiziet lēnāk un ilgāk kavējas. Katrai valstij un tautai ir vajadzīgi savi bēniņi. Tie dod kādu īpašu stabilitāti, kas nekā citādi nav iegūstama. Bēniņu lielākā bagātība ir to spēja būt citādiem…

programme.title: Atgriešanās savvaļā ar Benu Fouglu
programme.desc: Šoreiz Bens atgriežas Ziemeļindijā, lai vēlreiz apciemotu Stīvu Lallu, bijušo iznīcinātāju pilotu, kurš uzgrieza muguru Indijas augstākajai sabiedrībai, lai dzīvotu pieticīgu dzīvi Himalaju pakājē. Taču pat tur notiek nebeidzama cīņa, lai aizsargātu šo privāto savvaļas pleķīti. Lai gan pagājuši četri gadi un Stīvu piemeklējušas dažas ķibeles, viņš nav zaudējis savu sparu un asprātību.

programme.title: Gudrs, vēl gudrāks
programme.desc: Tiem, kas šobrīd iet 12. klasē, tepat aiz stūra svarīgākie eksāmeni un tad jau īsta - pieaugušo dzīve! Bet 17. aprīlī viņi vēl ir vidusskolēni, un seši paši gudrākie satiksies spēles "Gudrs, vēl gudrāks" 12. klašu finālā. Atgādināsim finālistus: Timurs Dobrovoļskis no Rīgas Valsts 1. ģimnāzijas, Jānis Poots no Rīgas Valsts vācu ģimnāzijas, Rinalds Veinbergs un Oļja Polis no RTU Inženierzinātņu vidusskolas, Evita Mārtinsone no Siguldas Valsts ģimnāzijas un Madara Paula Eglīte no Madonas Valsts ģimnāzijas. Muzikāls sveiciens no repa apvienības "Muud" - dziesma "Testē".

programme.title: LV jaunatklāšanas raidījums "TE!"
programme.desc: Astoņās raidījuma sērijās, ceļojot laikā caur Latvijas pagātni, tagadni un potenciālo nākotni, ar piedzīvojuma garšu, rotaļīgumu un izteiktu klātbūtnes sajūtu "TE!" vedīs jaunos Latvijas apceļošanas piedzīvojumos. Raidījumu vada Marta Selecka, Dace Salnāja, Māris Olte, Pauls Timrots, Māra Sleja un Gustavs Terzens. Raidījumu veido "VFS Films", un projektu līdzfinansē Mediju atbalsta fonds no Latvijas valsts budžeta līdzekļiem.

programme.title: LV jaunatklāšanas raidījums "TE!"
programme.desc: Astoņās raidījuma sērijās, ceļojot laikā caur Latvijas pagātni, tagadni un potenciālo nākotni, ar piedzīvojuma garšu, rotaļīgumu un izteiktu klātbūtnes sajūtu "TE!" vedīs jaunos Latvijas apceļošanas piedzīvojumos. Raidījumu vada Marta Selecka, Dace Salnāja, Māris Olte, Pauls Timrots, Māra Sleja un Gustavs Terzens. Raidījumu veido "VFS Films", un projektu līdzfinansē Mediju atbalsta fonds no Latvijas valsts budžeta līdzekļiem.

programme.title: Alpu dakteris
programme.desc: Nav labākas vietas, kur patverties no pilsētas kņadas, trokšņa un stresa, kā kalni. Bet dzīvot tur? Dzimto Alpu mazpilsētiņu, saucot tās gaisotni par smacējošu un aprobežotu, Mārtins pameta jau pirms daudziem gadiem, lai kļūtu par veiksmīgu ārstu kosmopolītiskajā lielpilsētā Ņujorkā. Nu viņš ir atgriezies. Uz pavisam īsu apciemojumu, lai atkal drīz atvadītos. Taču no likteņa neizbēgsi - atgriešanās mājās izrādās uz palikšanu. Jo pārāk liels ir trieciens, uzzinot, ka viņa pirmā mīlestība, kas pēc Mārtina aizbraukšanas apprecēja viņa paša brāli Hansu, ir mirusi. Taču atstājusi meitu, par kuras esamību Mārtins nekad pat nebija zinājis! Ar to izrādās pietiekami, lai izlemtu palikt Pēkšņi kļuvis par tēvu, Mārtins vēlas uzzināt vairāk par savu jauniegūto meitu Lili, iemantot viņas uzticēšanos. Tā dēļ viņš ir gatavs pat mēģināt sadarboties ar savu jaunāko brāli Hansu, kas joprojām jūt aizvainojumu. Hanss ir kļuvis par glābēju komandas vadītāju, un kopā ar Mārtinu viņi turpmāk neskaitāmas reizes riskēs ar savu dzīvību, lai glābtu kalnu negadījumu upurus vai kāpējus, ko pārsteigusi pēkšņa vētra. Mārtinu gaida atklāsme, ka bez saknēm nav iespējas turpināt dzīvi. Šeit viņš pilnībā aptvers arī to, ka būt par ārstu kalnos - tā nav tikai profesija, bet gan aicinājums. Kļūt par labu neatliekamās medicīniskās palīdzības sniedzēju kalnos iemācīties nevar, par tādu piedzimst. Un Mārtins Grūbers tāds neapšaubāmi ir!

programme.title: Milānas-Kortīnas 2026. gada ziemas olimpiskās spēles
programme.desc: Lielais fināls vīriešu hokeja turnīrā paredzēts pēdējā ziemas olimpisko spēļu dienā, jau pulksten 14.10 pēc vietējā laika. Tik agri tāpēc, ka tovakar vēl ir svinīgā spēļu noslēguma ceremonija, turklāt tā notiks Veronā, nevis Milānā. Šis fināls atkal būs īpašs, pēc 12 gadu pārtraukuma ziemas olimpiskajās spēlēs varēs piedalīties visi labākie NHL profesionāļi, šajā turnīrā ir speciāls pārtraukums. Pēdējo reizi tā notika Sočos 2014. gadā. Protams, šī sistēma automātiski par galvenajiem favorītiem padara Kanādas un ASV izlases, taču ne tikai. Ļoti spēcīgas komandas un izcili spēlētāji NHL ir arī Somijai, Zviedrijai un Čehijai, mūsdienās ļoti laba valstsvienība ir arī Šveicei un tāpat Vācijai. Gan jau kāds pārsteigums turnīrā būs noticis, bet, lai nu kā, finālā spēlēs divas pašas labākās komandas. Iepriekšējās spēlēs, nepiedaloties NHL hokejistiem, zelta medaļas ieguva Somija, 2018. gadā zeltu saņēma olimpiskie atlēti no Krievijas (tad uzvaru spēles pamatlaika pēdējā minūtē, turklāt skaitliskajā vairākumā, burtiski izlaida Vācija), Sočos un Vankūverā triumfēja Kanāda. Vēsturiski tieši kanādiešiem ir visvairāk zelta godalgas vīriešu hokejā - deviņas.

programme.title: Vienmēr formā!
programme.desc: Deutsche Welle žurnāls

programme.title: Aizliegtais paņēmiens
programme.desc: Lai uzzinātu par kāda notikuma patiesajiem apstākļiem vai iesaistīto personu nodomiem, raidījuma "Aizliegtais paņēmiens" komanda informācijas iegūšanai izmanto visdažādākos izmeklējošās žurnālistikas paņēmienus un žanrus – eksperimentus, testus, provokācijas, padziļinātus pētījumus, arī anonīmas intervijas. Žurnālisti padziļināti pēta un skatītājiem atklāj sociālpolitiskus tematus, kas ne vienmēr tiek izcelti citos medijos. Raidījums atklāj un atmasko, atsevišķos gadījumos sauc pie atbildības iesaistītās personas, norāda uz likumu nepilnībām, aicina mainīt pastāvošo kārtību, ja tā ir pretrunā sabiedrības interesēm. Raidījumu vada LTV Ziņu dienesta žurnālists Guntis Bojārs.

programme.title: Cilvēku tirgotāja sieva
programme.desc: Filmas pirmajā daļā iepazīstamies ar Amandu, viņas bērnību un trauksmainajiem pusaudžu gadiem, kā arī šķietami ideālo ģimenes dzīvi un straujo tās sabrukumu brīdī, kad viņas vīrs tiek apcietināts par iesaisti cilvēku tirdzniecībā. Uzzinot par vīram izvirzītajām apsūdzībām, Amandas pasaule apgriežas kājām gaisā - viņas pārliecība par ģimenes vienotību un ticība tam, ko viņa līdz šim uzskatīja par pareizu, tiek nopietni satricināta. Dokumentālais stāsts atklāj, kā sievietei, kura visu dzīvi bija veltījusi ģimenei, nākas saskarties ar realitāti, kas izrādās daudz skarbāka un traumatiskāka, nekā viņa varēja iedomāties.

programme.title: Komisārs Reksis
programme.desc: Kādu rītu Boromīni ģimenes villā savā istabā tiek atrasts miris grāfs Alfonso. Sākotnēji šķiet, ka aristokrāts izdarījis pašnāvību, bet nepaiet ne diennakts, kad villas dārzā tiek atrasts istabenes līķis. Reksis un Lorenco uzsāk sarežģītu izmeklēšanu, kuras laikā atklājas daudzas iekšējās intrigas un konflikti, kuri plosa augstdzimušo ģimeni.

programme.title: Atgriešanās savvaļā ar Benu Fouglu
programme.desc: Pirms vairākiem gadiem Bens Fougls apceļoja pasaules nomaļākās vietas, kur iepazinās ar cilvēkiem, kuri dod priekšroku dzīvošanai saskaņā ar dabu, nevis pilsētas labumiem. Tagad viņš tur atgriežas, lai vēlreiz tiktos ar šiem cilvēkiem un uzzinātu, kāda ir viņu dzīve un vai viņu sapnis par dzīvi paradīzē ir īstenojies.

programme.title: Jā, ministra kungs!
programme.desc: Eplbiju uzrunā Britu Ķīmijas korporācijas vadītājs, lai iegūtu ministra atbalstu propanola jeb metadikosīna ražošanai. Lai gan ķīmiskā viela ir nekaitīga, "BCC" pauž bažas, ka vārds "dioksīns" raisīs nepamatotas bažas sabiedrībā. Eplbijs pārliecina ministru, ka nav par ko uztraukties. Kad sāk pieaugt protesti pret ķīmisko vielu līgumu, Hakeram ir jārīkojas ātri.

programme.title: Inspektors Lūiss
programme.desc: Oksfordas universitātes studenti uzved "Venēcijas tirgotāju". Publiska mēģinājuma laikā viens no aktieriem tiek atrasts nodurts. Ironiskā kārtā augļotāja Šeiloka lomas izpildītājs bijis parādā naudu teju visiem izrādes dalībniekiem, un Lūiss ar Hataveju nespēj vien izsekot sarežģītajām kaislībām aizdomās turamo starpā. Hatavejs aiztur kādu krāpnieku, kura lietas izmeklēšanā noskaidrojas Lūisam svarīga informācija. Seržants vēlas izstāstīt inspektoram patiesību, taču satraucas, kā privātās ziņas ietekmēs abu draudzību. Tiek nogalināta bijusī Oksfordas studente, žurnāliste, kas uzodusi pēdas kādam lielam stāstam. Meklējot vainīgo, Lūisam nākas dzirdēt ne mazumu slavenu dramaturgu citātu.

programme.title: Melnais saraksts
programme.desc: Kritiķu un skatītāju iemīļots kriminālseriāls. Tā darbība sākas dienā, kad darbu FIB galvenajā birojā Vašingtonā uzsāk jauna profilētāja Elizabete Kīna. Tajā pašā rītā tur ierodas viens no FIB meklētākajiem noziedzniekiem, Reimonds "Reds" Redingtons, un labprātīgi ļauj sevi notvert. Reds palīdz FIB sagūstīt citu bīstamu noziedznieku un novērst uzbrukumu civiliedzīvotājiem. Viņš paziņo, ka viņam esot vesels saraksts un informācija par tādiem noziedzniekiem un teroristiem, par kuru esamību FIB pat nenojauš. Reds ir gatavs sadarboties ar vienu savādu noteikumu – viņš runās tikai ar Elizabeti. Tā sākas īpašas attiecības, kuru īstā daba un iemesls ir zināmi tikai Redingtonam. Lai gan pamatā seriāla darbība norit ASV, tas aizved arī uz dažādām eksotiskām vietām visā pasaulē un ļauj ieskatīties kriminālajā pasaulē. Dažādiem apbalvojumiem vairāku gadu laikā izvirzīti seriāla specefektu veidotāji, kaskadieri un muzikālais noformējums.

programme.title: Mūžīgā ēna
programme.desc: Policiju pārpludina zvani no cilvēkiem, kuriem šķiet, ka viņi atpazinuši balsi. Vecākie izmeklētāji pieķeras domai, ka slepkava nāk no Anglijas ziemeļiem, jo tā liecina viņa akcents. Visi, kuri nerunā ar šo akcentu, tiek atskaitīti no aizdomās turamajiem. Viens no konstebliem norāda uz Pīteru Satklifu kā iespējamo vainīgo, bet Diks Holands viņu neņem vērā, jo Satklifam ir Jorkšīras akcents. Oldfīlds un Holands dodas pie Olīvas Smeltas, kura neatkāpjas no tā, ka viņas uzbrucējs runāja ar Jorkšīras akcentu, un detektīvi viņai netic. Metropoles policija dod mājienu, ka varbūt Rietumjorkšīrai pienācis laiks lūgt Londonas palīdzību. Viens no detektīviem pamana kļūdu uzšķērdēja vēstulē un apgalvo, ka vēstuli nav rakstījis īstais slepkava. Bet viņa idejas tiek noraidītas. Džeklīnas vecāki raizējas par meitas drošību, jo Līdsā tiek nogalināta studente Barbara Līča, kļūstot par 12. upuri. 1980. gada novembrī tiek nogalināta arī Džeklīna. Viņas studiju biedri sarīko protesta gājienu. Un kāda cita jauna sieviete Olīvija Rīversa iekāpj Pītera Satklifa auto Šefīldā….

programme.title: Vienmēr formā!
programme.desc: Deutsche Welle žurnāls

programme.title: 700 pasaules brīnumi. Malaizija
programme.desc: Attīstītas pilsētas un necaurejami džungļi; metāla debesskrāpji un nožēlojami grausti. Musulmaņi un budisti, hinduisti un kristieši; pirmatnējas ciltis un klīrīgi angļi; mežonīgi pērtiķi un pieradināti lāči... Tā ir Malaizija. Tā ir kā kausēšanas katls, kurā sajaukušies visas Āzijas noslēpumi. Šī būs visekstremālākā, visnaturālistiskākā, visatklātākā un visvaldzinošākā raidījuma "700 pasaules brīnumi" sezona.

programme.title: 700 pasaules brīnumi. Malaizija
programme.desc: Attīstītas pilsētas un necaurejami džungļi; metāla debesskrāpji un nožēlojami grausti. Musulmaņi un budisti, hinduisti un kristieši; pirmatnējas ciltis un klīrīgi angļi; mežonīgi pērtiķi un pieradināti lāči... Tā ir Malaizija. Tā ir kā kausēšanas katls, kurā sajaukušies visas Āzijas noslēpumi. Šī būs visekstremālākā, visnaturālistiskākā, visatklātākā un visvaldzinošākā raidījuma "700 pasaules brīnumi" sezona.

programme.title: Uzrāviens
programme.desc: Raidījumā "Uzrāviens" stāstīsim par cilvēkiem, kuri negaida iespējas, bet tās rada. Tiksimies ar jaudīgiem Latvijas uzņēmējiem dažādās nozarēs, runāsim par viņu ceļu biznesā - veiksmi, stratēģijām un sāpīgām kļūdām, kas nereti kļuvušas par vērtīgākajām mācībām. Raidījumu vada biznesa stratēģe Anna Celmiņa un aktieris Gatis Gāga, kuri uzņēmējdarbību pazīst no atšķirīgām pieredzēm. Viņi pētīs uzņēmēju idejas ceļu līdz produktam un uzņēmuma izaugsmei - kā top jauni risinājumi, kā tiek pieņemti svarīgi lēmumi un kā uzņēmēji pielāgojas pārmaiņām.

programme.title: KaralisTe
programme.desc: Raidījumu veido studija VFS Films un atbalsta Latvijas vides aizsardzības fonds, Swedbank un Latvijas valsts meži. Raidījuma sadarbības partneri ir Neste, Bauskas alus, Volvo un žurnāls IR.

programme.title: Ielas garumā
programme.desc: Aprīļa mēnesis raidījumam "Ielas garumā" paies Dobelē. Sākām ar Dobeles pili, bet turpinām Pļavas ielas terasē pie Bērzes upes un Dzirnavu ielā, kas sākas otrpus upei agrākajā Dobeles muižas teritorijā. Pļavas ielu ierīkojis un pirmo māju uzcēlis Jānis Ilmers, kuram starpkaru laikā tur atradusies vadmalas krāsotava. Dzirnavu ielas stāsti lielākoties saistās ar skolu un skolotājiem, jo bērni tur mācījušies vismaz trīs dažādās ēkās un turpat tuvumā mituši arī skolotāji. Dzejniece, dobelniece Inese Zandere vēsturiskus faktus un emocionālas atmiņas ievijusi savos dzejoļos.

programme.title: Vides fakti
programme.desc: Raidījums par norisēm dabā un apkārtējā vidē. "Vides fakti" sniedz informāciju par sezonālām norisēm dabā un dzīvnieku pasaulē, par vides aktualitātēm, par videi draudzīgu dzīvesveidu, par aktuālām cilvēka un vides attiecībām ārpus Latvijas robežām. Raidījumā "Vides fakti" ir skatāmi arī piedzīvojumu sižeti par aktīvā tūrisma iespējām Latvijā, kā arī īsfilmas par neparastiem ceļojumiem pasaulē.

programme.title: 1:1. Aktuālā intervija
programme.desc: Raidījumā "1:1" [viens pret vienu] satiekas sabiedrībā zināma personība un žurnālists. Raidījums skaidro, analizē un ļauj izprast sabiedrībai nozīmīgas norises visdažādākajās dzīves jomās Latvijā un pasaulē, izprast personības nozīmīgumu, atbildību šo procesu virzībā. Viesi izvēlēti, ņemot vērā tā brīža aktualitātes vai arī konkrētās personas iespējamo ietekmi uz notikumiem nākotnē, – valsts pirmās amatpersonas, biznesa, kultūras un nevalstiskā sektora pārstāvji. Raidījumu vada žurnālists Gundars Rēders.

programme.title: De facto
programme.desc: LTV Ziņu dienesta veidotajā analītiski pētnieciskajā raidījumā "De Facto" skatītājiem nozīmīgus jautājumus izmeklē žurnālisti Matīss Arnicāns, Inga Šņore, Laine Fedotova, Ivo Leitāns un Ella Semjonova. "De Facto" uzmanības lokā ir netaisnības un pretrunas – ne tikai korupcijas, interešu konfliktu un citu noziedzīgu nodarījumu lietas, bet arī sabiedrībai būtisku cieņpilnas attieksmes un ētiskas rīcības pārkāpumu izmeklēšana.

programme.title: Pasaules panorāma
programme.desc: Globālo ziņu laikmetā notikums Āzijā vai Amerikas kontinentā jau rīt var mainīt dzīvi Eiropā, bet lēmums, kas pieņemts Rīgā – atbalsoties visā pasaulē. "Pasaules panorāma" piedāvā neatkarīgas un uzticamas ziņas, atspoguļojot un analizējot ārpolitikas aktualitātes, kā arī sarunas ar politologiem, ārpolitikas ekspertiem, pasaulē pazīstamām personībām par svarīgāko Baltijā un Ziemeļvalstīs, citviet Eiropā, kā arī visā pasaulē. Raidījumu vada LTV Ziņu dienesta ārzemju ziņu redaktori Toms Pastors un Ina Strazdiņa.

programme.title: V.I.P. - Veiksme. Intuīcija. Prāts
programme.desc: Pirms diviem mēnešiem noslēdzās 26. ziemas olimpiskās spēles, ko tālāk? Tagad ar nepacietību gaidām vasaras sporta parādi Losandželosā 2028. gadā, kurā, visticamāk, piedalīsies kāds no Uģa Joksta šī vakara viesiem. Komandu kapteiņi: Dāvis Skreivers un Aleksandrs Samoilovs. Dāvis Skreivers - komandas kapteinis, basketbolists. Studējis Latvijas Universitātē Komunikācijas zinātni, bijis augstskolas komandas spēlētājs. Reiz ieguvis duālās karjeras stipendiju par augstiem sasniegumiem sportā -⁠⁠ bijis U18 basketbola izlases spēlētājs un 3x3 U21 izlases spēlētājs. Pērn piedalījās Ķīnā notiekošajā Pasaules kausa izcīņā 3x3 basketbolā U23 vienībām. Toreiz mediji ziņoja, ka Skreivera uzņēmība ļāva latviešiem pieveikt amerikāņus. Francis Lācis - basketbolists, spēlē spēka uzbrucēja pozīcijā. Pēdējos gados pilnībā pievērsies 3x3 basketbolam, spēlējis ASV koledžu un universitāšu sporta klubos, arī Nīderlandē. Bija Latvijas 3x3 basketbola komandas spēlētājs olimpiskajā turnīrā Parīzē. 2025. gadā pārstāvēja Latvijas-Igaunijas basketbola līgas un Latvijas basketbola līgas klubu "Rīgas Zeļļi". Nauris Miezis - basketbolists, startē 3x3 basketbola disciplīnā. Olimpiskās zelta medaļas ieguvējs 2020. gada vasaras olimpiskajās spēlēs Tokijā. Pēdējā laikā profesionālo karjeru saistījis ar Ķīnu un Mongoliju. Bez olimpiskā zelta ir arī zelts un trīs sudrabi Eiropas kausā, sudrabs un bronza Pasaules kausā. Nauris ir arī erudīcijas spēļu veterāns un ģeogrāfijas zinātājs. Aleksandrs Samoilovs - komandas kapteinis. Izglītības un zinātnes ministrijas Sporta departamenta vadītājs, pludmales volejbolists un treneris. Ar iesauku "Karalis Lauva" ("Lion King") ilgstoši bijis līderis Latvijas pludmales volejbolā, 15 gadus startējis pasaules augstākā līmeņa sacensībās. Karjeras laikā viņš spēlējis kopā ar tādiem Latvijas sportistiem kā Jānis Šmēdiņš un Mārtiņš Pļaviņš - abi ir olimpisko medaļu ieguvēji. Kristians Fokerots - pludmales volejbolists. Viens no talantīgākajiem un perspektīvākajiem jaunās paaudzes Latvijas pludmales volejbolistiem. 2024. gadā 19 gadu vecumā kļuva par Eiropas čempionu pārī ar Mārtiņu Plaviņu, savukārt, 2025. gadā pārī ar Gustavu Auziņu kļuva par pasaules čempioniem vecuma grupā līdz 21 gadam. Līva Ēbere - šobrīd Komercskolas skolniece, pludmales volejboliste, Mārtiņa Pļaviņa audzēkne. Volejbola laukumā izceļas ar cīņassparu un labu aizsardzību, personiskās kvalitātēs dominē liela mērķtiecība. Izcīnījusi godalgotas vietas 2024. gada Eiropas čempionātā U22. 2025. gadā pārstāvējusi Latviju gan Eiropas, gan pasaules čempionātos, guvusi augstus rezultātus.

programme.title: Aizliegtais paņēmiens
programme.desc: Lai uzzinātu par kāda notikuma patiesajiem apstākļiem vai iesaistīto personu nodomiem, raidījuma "Aizliegtais paņēmiens" komanda informācijas iegūšanai izmanto visdažādākos izmeklējošās žurnālistikas paņēmienus un žanrus – eksperimentus, testus, provokācijas, padziļinātus pētījumus, arī anonīmas intervijas. Žurnālisti padziļināti pēta un skatītājiem atklāj sociālpolitiskus tematus, kas ne vienmēr tiek izcelti citos medijos. Raidījums atklāj un atmasko, atsevišķos gadījumos sauc pie atbildības iesaistītās personas, norāda uz likumu nepilnībām, aicina mainīt pastāvošo kārtību, ja tā ir pretrunā sabiedrības interesēm. Raidījumu vada LTV Ziņu dienesta žurnālists Guntis Bojārs.

programme.title: Genghis Khan: The Secret History of the Mongols
programme.desc: After Chinggis Khans secret burial, his son Ogedei is proclaimed ruler of the Mongol Empire. He brings a very different leadership style as he conquers Armenia, Georgia and the Jin Empire. He orders the building of the grand capital of Karakorum and sets the stage for a brutal campaign against Kievan Rus, led by his nephew Batu and the veteran general Subudai.

programme.title: Genghis Khan: The Secret History of the Mongols
programme.desc: The Mongolian Empire launched a devastating campaign through the lands of Russia and Europe, crushing knights with Mongol speed and strategy. As they prepared to push deeper into Europe, news of Ogedeis death halted the advance, triggering a struggle for succession over an empire that now stretched from China to Europe, the largest the world had ever seen.

programme.title: Megacities
programme.desc: George Orwell once warned of a future where "Big Brother is watching." Today in London, he is. But his is not an evil eye. Instead, its an eye toward averting disaster. Not one but three great rivers flow through London - by air, water, and land. They are the keys to keeping this MegaCity alive and running: (1) London has the worlds busiest international airspace; (2) The Thames is the worlds busiest urban river; and (3) The streets of London are so jammed, you have to pay to drive on them. One major accident anywhere can cripple this MegaCity, where keeping people and goods moving is the key to its survival. Yet every minute -- in three dimensions -- millions of people and vehicles are on a collision course. To head off disaster, London deploys high-tech eyes everywhere, constantly scanning the skies, the river, and the ground. This is a view of London like nothing ever seen before: going behind the scenes to watch the watchers and their incredible technologies, in all three dimensions: from the hurtling and congested heights of air traffic control, to the murky and dangerous depths beneath the Thames. As it hurtles toward a collision course with the future, London cant take its eyes off the prize. Approved

programme.title: Worlds Toughest Fixes
programme.desc: Worlds Toughest Fixes A nuclear power plant turbine needs to be replaced. A cruise ship needs another engine. When big machines experience problems, they often require big solutions. These fixes take much more than your average piece of duct tape. Master rigger and host Sean Riley discovers how these heavy duty industrial repairs are made, on everything from high voltage electricity lines to nuclear power plants, and meets the specialists charged with putting things right. A professional rigger with a passion for adventure, Riley is not afraid to strap on a hazmat suit or attach himself to a live high-voltage power line to get the job done. Hes seen more than his fair share of perilous situations, but on each job he has to show the crew he knows his stuff. Its usually a quick initiation, and soon Riley is flexing his engineering muscle while helping experts solve problems of enormous proportions. Whether dangling from ropes hundreds of feet in the air or diving close to a construction vessels propellers, Rileys engineering prowess travels inside the marvels of large-scale industry and shows what happens when things do not always go to plan.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: First Alaskans
programme.desc: For Alaska Natives, the only way to protect their way of life is by being on the land and continuing their traditions. Tig Strassburg and Louise Moses break trail for the upcoming moose season. Marvin Agnot and Justin Phillips search for elusive reindeer outside of their village. Joel Jacko builds a root cellar under his house. And Gage and Avery Hoffman travel long distances for an important hunt.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: First Alaskans
programme.desc: Alaska Natives prepare for winter by scouring for resources essential to surviving the looming subzero temperatures. Avery and Gage Hoffman hit the river at dawn in pursuit of moose. Marvin Agnot and Justin Phillips build a smokehouse and procure salmon. Jody Potts-Joseph and Jamey Joseph travel the highlands for berries and birds. And Tig and Evan Strassburg build a raft to transport firewood.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Radio silence between pilots and air traffic controllers can mean many different things, but only the physical evidence can reveal the true story. Three shocking cases send investigators hunting for answers. A Greek airliner goes rogue and crashes outside Athens. A China Airlines 747 disappears from radar and the culprit is discovered on the ocean floor. And, when controllers lose contact with a private jet, fighter planes scramble to intervene.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Every time a plane crashes, the world takes notice. And so do the experts whose job it is to figure out what happened. Air Crash Investigation uncovers the truth behind the most legendary aviation disasters, and every episode features eyewitness accounts, captivating reenactments, state-of-the-art CGI, and interviews with the investigators who ultimately determined what went wrong. This season on Air Crash Investigation: Conflicting stories emerge after a Swedish cargo plane spirals to the ground; an African airliner crashes in the wilderness and the cause proves too sinister to be believed; and, when a Pakistani passenger jet disappears on approach to Kathmandu, Nepalese investigators must determine how it ended up on a crash course with the Himalayas.

programme.title: Science of Stupid
programme.desc: Science of Stupid, series 8. Dallas Campbell hosts the show that combines serious science with some of the craziest, most spectacular user generated clips ever recorded. In each programme we show 40 to 50 clips of misadventure: ordinary folk making extraordinary mistakes and paying the price. We analyse the science behind the mishaps, with the help of bespoke animation and super slow-motion cinematography.

programme.title: Food Factory USA
programme.desc: Behind each bag of chips, can of beer, candy bar, or loaf of bread, lies a mega-industrial production line that brings each product to the masses. Introducing Food Factory, a mesmerizing peek behind the scenes of the weird and wonderful processes that produce everyones favorite foods. From raw materials to finished products, Food Factory reveals in awe-inspiring detail how mass-produced favorites are really made. Put on a hardhat and get ready to meet the food!

programme.title: Food Factory USA
programme.desc: Behind each bag of chips, can of beer, candy bar, or loaf of bread, lies a mega-industrial production line that brings each product to the masses. Introducing Food Factory, a mesmerizing peek behind the scenes of the weird and wonderful processes that produce everyones favorite foods. From raw materials to finished products, Food Factory reveals in awe-inspiring detail how mass-produced favorites are really made. Put on a hardhat and get ready to meet the food!

programme.title: Drain the Oceans
programme.desc: The largest treasure ever found underwater makes headlines worldwide, but soon, attention turns to who really owns the half-billion dollar treasure of the mysteriously code-named Black Swan? Fearing one of their most prized historical treasures has been uncovered, the Kingdom of Spain takes on salvage company Odyssey Marine Exploration for the treasure. As the two sides fight it out in a Tampa court, it soon becomes clear that not all is what is seems..

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim and Fuzz travel to Northern Ireland to take on a 1972 Generation 1 Toyota Celica a rare Japanese coupe that has seen better days. The cars owner is 50 year old Celica obsessive Noel who bought the car with a plan to restore it and use it as his daily driver. However Noels whole life took a turn for the worse when he suffered a series of spinal injuries that lost him his job, his home and put his dream car restoration on hold for good.

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim and Fuzz take on the restoration of a lightweight British pocket rocket , a 1997 Lotus Elise. The cars owner, 44 year old former print manager Sarah, had been planning to get the car back on the road with the help of her dad Phil until double tragedy struck - he fell victim to incurable bowel cancer then sadly Sarah herself was also diagnosed with cancer. The cars restoration was put on hold. Mother Jenny wrote in to Car SOS hoping to bring back her daughters much needed smile.

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim and Fuzz have travelled to Milton Keynes to try and rescue Craigs 1930 Ford Model A, an historic car with an impressive pedigree. The cars owner is 58 year old former electrician Craig a dyed in the wool classic car lover. Hes had his Model A for over 30 years, however after a tragic motor cycle accident any plans for restoration evaporated when his whole world was turned upside down. Once the car hits the Car SOS workshop its wooden coachwork and 90 year old parts prove a big challenge for the team.

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Brand new: Tim Shaw and Fuzz Townshend are off to Loughborough to take on a 1992 Saab 900 Turbo thats in desperate need of repair. The car belongs to Saab enthusiast and former electrical engineer Pravesh. Sadly, due to ill health, Pravesh has been left with little strength to work on the car, so its been left to rot. His family believe getting his Saab back on the road would give him the boost he needs.

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim and Fuzz head to Scotland to take on a 1993 Toyota Supra Mk.4 owned by former competitive motorcycle racer Lisa, who after a road accident is no longer able to ride her beloved bikes. Along came her Japanese supercar which helped fulfil her need for speed. Ongoing mobility problems have meant the car has ended in need of TLC. Lisas friends and family hope a fully restored car will lift her spirits.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: Even during a pandemic, smuggling never stops. After adjusting tactics in the early days of the COVID crisis to meet the increasing flow of narcotics coming across our southern land borders, the Department of Homeland Security is now pivoting back to our nations airports where international travel is starting to rev back up again. Whether narco-traffickers try to slip through an airport, seaport or land crossing, vigilant officers are on high-alert to stem the flow of illegal contraband. Using every tool available to them, DHS will stop at nothing to catch a smuggler.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: Even during a pandemic, smuggling never stops. After adjusting tactics in the early days of the COVID crisis to meet the increasing flow of narcotics coming across our southern land borders, the Department of Homeland Security is now pivoting back to our nations airports where international travel is starting to rev back up again. Whether narco-traffickers try to slip through an airport, seaport or land crossing, vigilant officers are on high-alert to stem the flow of illegal contraband. Using every tool available to them, DHS will stop at nothing to catch a smuggler.

programme.title: Construction Fails
programme.desc: Glass may be the most popular construction material in the modern age. But constructing with glass is challenging and dangerous. It spontaneously breaks and falls from skyscrapers and it even crushes warehouse workers. We investigate the scientific anomaly of nickel sulfide inclusion and its effect on glass The vast majority of demolitions rely on the excavator to bring the building down. In this story we witness the perfect way to do it and contrast it with multiple examples of demolition by excavator fails. Operator error, unstable ground, unpredictable fall angles - we show it all.

programme.title: Construction Fails
programme.desc: Construction cranes are towers in the sky - except when they collapse. Our first story examines three disasters in Seattle, Manhattan and Bangkok. Three disasters: three different reasons for collapse. We examine what went wrong. The Artz Pedregal Mall in Mexico City had only been open a few months before the cantilevered section of the structure came crashing to the street below. How could a brand new building fail so dramatically? Whats so precarious about cantilever designs?

programme.title: Construction Fails
programme.desc: In Turkey, buildings claiming to be earthquake-proof end up falling down. Two gantry cranes bump into each other on a harbor in Taiwan; and a battery factory blows up in South Korea, resulting in a bad day at the office. Knob and tube wiring might be obsolete, but the Sydney Opera House is going strong, despite its many initial design flaws. The city of Dresden wishes they could reverse engineer the collapse of the Carola Bridge.

programme.title: Construction Fails
programme.desc: Was the tragedy of the space shuttle Columbia baked into the original design? A wave of ship strikes has Chinas bridge builders working overtime. Temporary stages are easy to put up and easy to take down, but sometimes they come down at the wrong time: suddenly and all at once. Check out hotels that tumble; take a tour of some of the worlds most expensive and useless airports, and learn why a Shanghai apartment tower dropped like a slab.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Every time a plane crashes, the world takes notice. And so do the experts whose job it is to figure out what happened. Air Crash Investigation uncovers the truth behind the most legendary aviation disasters, and every episode features eyewitness accounts, captivating reenactments, state-of-the-art CGI, and interviews with the investigators who ultimately determined what went wrong. This season on Air Crash Investigation: Conflicting stories emerge after a Swedish cargo plane spirals to the ground; an African airliner crashes in the wilderness and the cause proves too sinister to be believed; and, when a Pakistani passenger jet disappears on approach to Kathmandu, Nepalese investigators must determine how it ended up on a crash course with the Himalayas.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: With flames emerging through the cockpit floor, the pilots of Pilgrim Airlines 458 are desperate to land. Amid smoke, extreme heat and zero visibility, they somehow manage to touch down on a frozen Rhode Island reservoir. Within minutes, the inferno destroys any evidence of how the fire started. And with no data recorder, its a surviving pilot who ultimatley gives investigators the break they need.

programme.title: Vikings: The Rise and Fall
programme.desc: Follows a crucial change of perspective. The series looks at the history of the Norsemen from the perspective of Norse mythology and at the same time provides insights into the latest bioarchaeological investigations. The range of topics ranges from the attack on the northern English monastery of Lindisfarne and the founding of Kievan Rus to the siege of Constantinople, the journey to America and the conquest of the English kingdom in 1066.

programme.title: Vikings: The Rise and Fall
programme.desc: Follows a crucial change of perspective. The series looks at the history of the Norsemen from the perspective of Norse mythology and at the same time provides insights into the latest bioarchaeological investigations. The range of topics ranges from the attack on the northern English monastery of Lindisfarne and the founding of Kievan Rus to the siege of Constantinople, the journey to America and the conquest of the English kingdom in 1066.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: Even during a pandemic, smuggling never stops. After adjusting tactics in the early days of the COVID crisis to meet the increasing flow of narcotics coming across our southern land borders, the Department of Homeland Security is now pivoting back to our nations airports where international travel is starting to rev back up again. Whether narco-traffickers try to slip through an airport, seaport or land crossing, vigilant officers are on high-alert to stem the flow of illegal contraband. Using every tool available to them, DHS will stop at nothing to catch a smuggler.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: The U.S. Coast Guard stops smugglers with over 13,000 kilos of cocaine at sea and transfers custody to Homeland Security Investigations for prosecution. At Dulles International Airport, near the nations capital, U.S. Customs and Border Protection officers uncover weapons heading outbound during checks for unreported currency. In El Paso, CBP Agricultural Specialists inspect live and deceased animals to protect the U.S. from foreign diseases, like avian flu.

programme.title: Airport Security: Colombia
programme.desc: El Dorado International Airport officials must put their sagacity and experience to the test in order to detect the boldest and most original attempts at breaking the law that take place at the airport. In this episode, three passengers are caught carrying a total of 120 cocaine capsules inside their bodies and they in turn confess the dramatic circumstances they claim pushed them into committing a crime. Immigration agents face the challenge of deporting eight Bangladeshi nationals who are traveling using false documentation. Also, a young man shows great imagination when he hides a stash of cocaine in an unexpected part of his luggage. And a Dutch passenger dares to carry large quantities of cocaine in the fake bottom of both his suitcases. Meanwhile, customs officials work tirelessly to stop undeclared cash from entering the country, as it is sometimes linked to criminal activity.

programme.title: Airport Security: To Catch a Smuggler Latin America Compilation
programme.desc: Parents with kids are arrested for drug-trafficking. From Airport Security Colombia and Peru, cocaine busts that include families. A mother with kids going to Barcelona carries cocaine in food packages. A man with kids at home confesses. A mother leaving the country with kids uses fake documents. A woman with her infant son enters the country with help from officials. A couple are not what they seem. The woman did it to help her daughter.

programme.title: Airport Security: To Catch a Smuggler Latin America Compilation
programme.desc: Drug-trafficking is risky business. In Airport Security Colombia and Peru, suspects try to evade detection. A couple traveling to Punta Cana is not what they seem. The man risked it all for money. A woman carrying cocaine on her body did it to start a business and help her family. A first-time carrier hiding cocaine in traditional handicraft mats gambles and loses. A Syrian man uses false documents twice, hoping to reunite with family in Europe.

programme.title: Airport Security: To Catch a Smuggler Latin America Compilation
programme.desc: Clueless carriers, and people betrayed. Officials from Airport Security Colombia and Peru must remain vigilant. A womans boyfriend asks her to carry bottles. She has no idea they contain liquid cocaine. A man with cocaine in his suitcase claims his son-in-law is responsible. A US woman may have been tricked into drug-trafficking. A construction worker is given a bag with cocaine. Of two Ukrainian friends, one claims to have tricked the other.

programme.title: Vikings: The Rise and Fall
programme.desc: Follows a crucial change of perspective. The series looks at the history of the Norsemen from the perspective of Norse mythology and at the same time provides insights into the latest bioarchaeological investigations. The range of topics ranges from the attack on the northern English monastery of Lindisfarne and the founding of Kievan Rus to the siege of Constantinople, the journey to America and the conquest of the English kingdom in 1066.

programme.title: Vikings: The Rise and Fall
programme.desc: Follows a crucial change of perspective. The series looks at the history of the Norsemen from the perspective of Norse mythology and at the same time provides insights into the latest bioarchaeological investigations. The range of topics ranges from the attack on the northern English monastery of Lindisfarne and the founding of Kievan Rus to the siege of Constantinople, the journey to America and the conquest of the English kingdom in 1066.

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim and Fuzz take on the restoration of a lightweight British pocket rocket , a 1997 Lotus Elise. The cars owner, 44 year old former print manager Sarah, had been planning to get the car back on the road with the help of her dad Phil until double tragedy struck - he fell victim to incurable bowel cancer then sadly Sarah herself was also diagnosed with cancer. The cars restoration was put on hold. Mother Jenny wrote in to Car SOS hoping to bring back her daughters much needed smile.

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim and Fuzz have travelled to Milton Keynes to try and rescue Craigs 1930 Ford Model A, an historic car with an impressive pedigree. The cars owner is 58 year old former electrician Craig a dyed in the wool classic car lover. Hes had his Model A for over 30 years, however after a tragic motor cycle accident any plans for restoration evaporated when his whole world was turned upside down. Once the car hits the Car SOS workshop its wooden coachwork and 90 year old parts prove a big challenge for the team.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: First Alaskans
programme.desc: Alaska Natives must use the teachings of their elders to find resources for the long winter. The Pingayak family travels ancestral land in search of a moose. Gage and Avery Hoffman challenge each other to secure fish and fowl. Joel Jacko and his daughter Anzlie use homemade spears to fish for salmon. Tig Strassburg enlists his daughters in a search for essential protein.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: First Alaskans
programme.desc: Alaska Natives make their final push of the fall. Tig and Louise look to secure enough protein to feed their large family through the winter. While at river camp, the Pingayaks are blessed with a surprise harvest. Marvin races to catch as many salmon as he can when a rare end-of-season window opens. And the Hoffmans bring a native custom to moose camp by building a traditional steam bath.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Every time a plane crashes, the world takes notice. And so do the experts whose job it is to figure out what happened. Air Crash Investigation uncovers the truth behind the most legendary aviation disasters, and every episode features eyewitness accounts, captivating reenactments, state-of-the-art CGI, and interviews with the investigators who ultimately determined what went wrong. This season on Air Crash Investigation: Conflicting stories emerge after a Swedish cargo plane spirals to the ground; an African airliner crashes in the wilderness and the cause proves too sinister to be believed; and, when a Pakistani passenger jet disappears on approach to Kathmandu, Nepalese investigators must determine how it ended up on a crash course with the Himalayas.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: With flames emerging through the cockpit floor, the pilots of Pilgrim Airlines 458 are desperate to land. Amid smoke, extreme heat and zero visibility, they somehow manage to touch down on a frozen Rhode Island reservoir. Within minutes, the inferno destroys any evidence of how the fire started. And with no data recorder, its a surviving pilot who ultimatley gives investigators the break they need.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation Special Report
programme.desc: Three planes fatally out of balance force investigators to question every calculation. Its a flight risk thats entirely preventable, and yet repeated disasters reconfirm the need for critical backup systems. With nearly 90,000 pounds of denim on board, a cargo plane in Miami crashes moments after lifting off. A packed commuter flight slams into a North Carolina hangar, revealing a deadly industry oversight. And, the NTSB is called in when a jumbo jet loaded with armored military vehicles pancakes to the ground in Afghanistan.

programme.title: Food Factory USA
programme.desc: Behind each bag of chips, can of beer, candy bar, or loaf of bread, lies a mega-industrial production line that brings each product to the masses. Introducing Food Factory, a mesmerizing peek behind the scenes of the weird and wonderful processes that produce everyones favorite foods. From raw materials to finished products, Food Factory reveals in awe-inspiring detail how mass-produced favorites are really made. Put on a hardhat and get ready to meet the food!

programme.title: Notre Dame: Race Against the Inferno
programme.desc: On 15th April 2019, during Holy Monday Mass, the worlds most famous cathedral caught fire. Notre-Dame de Paris was ablaze in minutes, as an epic battle unfolded for heroic French firefighters. Under the gaze of the worlds media, they fought the inferno for more than 15 hours. Exclusive footage and interviews bring vividly to life the moment-by-moment courage of the Paris fire and police services, as they put their lives on the line to save this historic building.

programme.title: Inside Sydney Airport
programme.desc: Sydney Airport is a city within a city, with thousands of crew keeping operations flowing. The work never slows, from changing a wind sock, painting a runway at midnight, repairing a stuck airbridge before the plane arrives, saving a maintenance worker from a stuck elevator, or putting out a potentially catastrophic fire that traps hundreds of passengers on a recently arrived flight.

programme.title: Inside Sydney Airport
programme.desc: With the Prime Minister of Singapore due to arrive, Security at the airport is on high alert. A passenger is detected in possession of a dangerous weapon. Meanwhile the search is on for a woman reported to have collapsed on the street. Duty Manager Mel is excited to learn that hell escort his favourite Pop Artist when they arrive at Sydney Airport.

programme.title: Inside Melbourne Airport
programme.desc: A380 Turnaround Coordinator, Diana orchestrates Cargo, Ground Operations and Baggage Services to get the biggest passenger plane off the ground. Night works on a new taxiway mark the beginning of an airport wide upgrade and an I.T. outage stops international passengers at the border as the Integrated Operations Centre swing into action to resolve congestion.

programme.title: Inside Melbourne Airport
programme.desc: Baggage manager Brodie races against the clock to reunite a passenger with their lost luggage. An airport visitor faces an unexpected mishap. In the hangar, engineers tackle a complex engineering challenge. As a full moon rises, the night shift contends with problem passengers. Adding to the pressure, a construction crews staircase installation risks blocking the airports sole access road.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: Even during a pandemic, smuggling never stops. After adjusting tactics in the early days of the COVID crisis to meet the increasing flow of narcotics coming across our southern land borders, the Department of Homeland Security is now pivoting back to our nations airports where international travel is starting to rev back up again. Whether narco-traffickers try to slip through an airport, seaport or land crossing, vigilant officers are on high-alert to stem the flow of illegal contraband. Using every tool available to them, DHS will stop at nothing to catch a smuggler.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: Even during a pandemic, smuggling never stops. After adjusting tactics in the early days of the COVID crisis to meet the increasing flow of narcotics coming across our southern land borders, the Department of Homeland Security is now pivoting back to our nations airports where international travel is starting to rev back up again. Whether narco-traffickers try to slip through an airport, seaport or land crossing, vigilant officers are on high-alert to stem the flow of illegal contraband. Using every tool available to them, DHS will stop at nothing to catch a smuggler.

programme.title: Inside Airport: Lost and Found
programme.desc: Airport employees reunite travelers with their lost items, including a pair of ornate Shriners fezzes, a brides pearl necklace, and a $12,000 Jaeger watch. In New Orleans, a mom retrieves the wallet she left on the plane after buying snacks for her kids, and in Alabama shoppers from around the country line up for hours to enter Unclaimed Baggages giant annual sale of lost ski equipment.

programme.title: Inside Airport: Lost and Found
programme.desc: Airport workers undertake true detective work to trace the owner of a duffel bag brimming with old family photos. A woman searches for Christmas decorations that are part of a family gifting tradition. In Tampa, the lost and found department donates items to a local womens shelter, including a $700 purse. In New Orleans, a young man loses his wallet upon arriving for a college tour.

programme.title: Amsterdam Central 24/7
programme.desc: During the Dutch F1 Grand Prix, Amsterdam Central will have to deal with 60,000 racing fanatics. They will depart throughout the morning, but will all come back at the same time. For Traffic Control and the station employees, it is all hands-on deck to manage the enormous flow of people. While people are trying to prevent passenger congestion, the shops are waiting for their delayed goods.

programme.title: Amsterdam Central 24/7
programme.desc: Kings Day is the busiest day of the year at Amsterdam Central Station. While Ticket and Services employee Alexandra, and Station Manager Rene try to steer the crowds in the right direction, Assistant Manager Michel is busy coordinating the flow of goods due to a broken freight elevator. Meanwhile, officers Menno and Carolien revive a girl who has fallen ill.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Harrowing stories of tragedy and triumph are brought to life through official reports, transcripts and interviews with the pilots, air traffic controllers and lucky survivors of historys most terrifying crashes. Widely considered to be the safest form of travel, air transportation is still in its infancy and when midair calamity strikes, the results are often catastrophic. From the cockpit to the cabin, from the control room to the crash scene, we uncover just what went wrong.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Every time a plane crashes, the world takes notice. And so do the experts whose job it is to figure out what happened. Air Crash Investigation uncovers the truth behind the most legendary aviation disasters, and every episode features eyewitness accounts, captivating reenactments, state-of-the-art CGI, and interviews with the investigators who ultimately determined what went wrong. The series looks at the history of the Norsemen from the perspective of Norse mythology and at the same time provides insights into the latest bioarchaeological investigations. The range of topics ranges from the attack on the northern English monastery of Lindisfarne and the founding of Kievan Rus to the siege of Constantinople, the journey to America and the conquest of the English kingdom in 1066.

programme.title: Ocean with David Attenborough
programme.desc: David Attenborough draws on a lifetime of experience to reveal Earths most spectacular underwater habitats, showing that were in the greatest age of Ocean discovery and highlighting its vital importance. While exposing the Oceans biggest challenges, Attenboroughs message is one of hope: the opportunity for marine life recovery on an unprecedented scale is within reach.

programme.title: The Tale of Sylian
programme.desc: Nikola, a farmer grappling with the harsh reality of new economic policies, is unable to sell his land or crops. When his family leaves in search of a better life abroad, he takes a job as a landfill attendant, where he encounters the injured white stork Silyan. As Nikola nurses the bird back to health, an unlikely bond forms between man and animal.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Repatriating Indian nationals from Dubai in the midst of the COVID-19 epidemic, Air India Express Flight 1344 is on final approach to Calicut airport amid heavy showers, reduced visibility, and strong winds. The treacherous tabletop runway leaves no margin for error. And after a first missed attempt, the Boeing 737-800 touches down—yet fails to stop—and plunges into a gorge. The aircraft breaks apart on impact, killing 21 people, including the two pilots. At first, investigators suspect a problem with the braking system. But they soon discover a shocking malfunction of an entirely different nature. For some reason, the aircraft came in above the glide slope, flew well past the touchdown zone, and ran out of runway. And the fatal cause is logged on the cockpit voice recorder.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Korean Air Flight 6316 is en route to Seoul with a load of non-hazardous cargo. But shortly after takeoff, the pilots struggle to navigate the skies above Shanghai. The controller notices the plane isnt climbing to its assigned altitude. And within minutes, the MD-11F disappears from radar altogether and slams into a residential neighborhood. The massive impact registers the equivalent of a 1.6-magnitude earthquake, destroys the flight data recorder, and claims the lives of five civilians and the three-man crew. Investigators from China, South Korea, and the US join forces, and are soon able to rule out both mechanical issues and sabotage. Its only when they reconstruct the flight in a simulator that the mystery begins to unravel—and they come to a startling realization.

programme.title: Toronto Airport Uncovered
programme.desc: Spring break brings a surge in passenger numbers and added pressures on airport staff and infrastructure: heavy bags rip a section of the baggage conveyor belt which needs fixing before the afternoon rush. A low-cost-holiday jet with millions of miles on the clock needs a new engine. Staff must race passengers from a delayed flight to their jet headed for the Caribbean, and an elite restaurant along with staff on the apron feel the heat as passenger numbers soar.

programme.title: Toronto Airport Uncovered
programme.desc: As thunder rumbles and rain pours, maintenance teams carry out urgent post winter repairs, but lightning forces them inside. A hardworking ground support engineer struggles to keep flights on time in the worsening rain. Repairs on a faulty 787 go to the wire. A ramp team has an hour to re-load an entire planes cargo, and two dogs receive special treatment enroute to their loved ones.

programme.title: Vikings: The Rise and Fall
programme.desc: Follows a crucial change of perspective. The series looks at the history of the Norsemen from the perspective of Norse mythology and at the same time provides insights into the latest bioarchaeological investigations. The range of topics ranges from the attack on the northern English monastery of Lindisfarne and the founding of Kievan Rus to the siege of Constantinople, the journey to America and the conquest of the English kingdom in 1066.

programme.title: Lawless Island
programme.desc: Port Protection is home to the few who have left behind normal society and chosen a different life in a remote Alaskan community, where survival of the individuals and community cannot sustain without the other. The stakes are high. The land is rugged and unforgiving and the seas which surround Port Protection are cold and merciless. With risk comes a reward more profound than mere survival: a world of beauty and freedom with the security of community and without the constraints of bureaucracy. In Port Protection there are no clear roads to survival, inhabitants must carve one themselves.

programme.title: Lawless Island
programme.desc: Port Protection is home to the few who have left behind normal society and chosen a different life in a remote Alaskan community, where survival of the individuals and community cannot sustain without the other. programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Drawing the attention of the entire world, three fatal design flaws put air crash investigators in a storm of controversy. When one of former race car driver Niki Laudas planes nosedives into a Thai jungle, a one-in-a-million failure reveals a weak spot in every Boeing 767. A piece of the plane blows off a Turkish Airlines DC-10 causing the most catastrophic mid-air emergency of its time. And, a risky test flight is the only way to uncover the startling truth about what brought down Atlantic Southeast Airlines Flight 2311.

programme.title: Africas Hidden Wonders
programme.desc: A land full of extreme environments and teeming with iconic wildlife, Africa holds a fascination like no other continent. This series takes the viewer on a journey from harsh desert landscapes to towering peaks, and from vast, sprawling grasslands to raging river torrents. The three episodes cover the mist-covered jungles and mountains of Rwanda and the great apes who call it home; the largest desert in the world, the Sahara, where the scarcity of water and food make life a daily challenge for the creatures who compete for them; and the cradle of humanity, Ethiopia, a weather-ravaged land full of natural beauty and unique wildlife.

programme.title: Africas Deadliest
programme.desc: Africa is a land sculpted by time where animals have evolved complex weapons to arm them in the battle to live another day. An elephants tusks can defend, or attack. An octopus uses camouflage to find food, or hide from an enemy. A Cape Fur Seals speed and agility are valuable tools to catch a penguin, but ineffectual against a Great White Shark. A single hippopotamus holds a pride of twelve lions at bay with his sheer bulk, but backs down when faced with the piercing teeth of another hippo. With lethal weapons wielded by fearsome predators and prey, animals walk a precarious path, here among Africas Deadliest.

programme.title: Africas Deadliest

programme.title: Africas Wild Geniuses
programme.desc: Africa, with its diverse ecosystems from arid deserts to lush forests, is home to some remarkable wild geniuses. While these outliers may not be the strongest, they compensate with their wit. They deploy adaptive strategies and surprising maneuvers to survive against all odds. In the desert, meerkats teach their young to communicate while the caracal uses adaptations to hunt elusive prey, and the wheel spider uses its engineering skills to ride the dunes. In the savannah, the secretarybird cares for her chicks; the dung beetle navigates obstacles; and the Thomsons gazelle relies on keen instinct. In the Highlands, gelada monkeys choose leaders to maintain social order, and the Ethiopian wolf uses clever tricks to feed her cubs. In the forest, the aye-aye and chameleon use their supernatural skills to forage the forest.

programme.title: Africas Deadliest

programme.title: South Americas Weirdest Animals
programme.desc: South America is a rich and diverse land. Stunning landscapes harbor elusive critters that have evolved to thrive here. But survival is not assured because the abundant prey is closely followed by powerful predators. From giant killer dolphins to the largest cat in the Americas, this vast continent is a lethal predator battleground.

programme.title: Built to Survive
programme.desc: Phil Breslin, third generation Indigenous educator, biologist and adventurer is on a quest to reveal some of the strangest and most specialised animal adaptations on the planet. Focusing on Australias incredibly varied landscapes and environments, Phil yarns with First Nations people about habitats, traverses deserts, dives in the oceans depths and uses science to identify Australias ultimate animal survivors.

programme.title: Built to Survive
programme.desc: Phil Breslin, third generation Indigenous educator, biologist and adventurer is on a quest to reveal some of the strangest and most specialised animal adaptations on the planet. Focusing on Australias incredibly varied landscapes and environments, Phil yarns with First Nations people about habitats, traverses deserts, dives in the oceans depths and uses science to identify Australias ultimate animal survivors.

programme.title: Strangest Nature
programme.desc: Evolution has created countless wondrous creatures that are colorful, amazing and strange. The darker side of nature reveals some of the most bizarre forms natural selection has produced. Alien animals reveal their otherworldly features. Stick insects disguise even their droppings as twigs, water striders glide on liquid as if defying physics, and dragonfly nymphs strike with spring-loaded jaws while breathing through gills in their abdomen. Beneath the beaches of South Africa, plough snails lie buried, breathing through siphons as they swarm dead flesh in the surf. From kelp forests to freshwater pools, camouflage, mutation, and isolation have created animals that are stranger than fiction.

programme.title: National Parks: USA
programme.desc: Along Washington States rugged coast, Olympic National Park protects 1 million acres of diverse habitat. Coastal fog hits glacier-capped mountains, drenching the land in record rainfall and giving rise to temperate rainforests. This unique landscape hosts a rich biodiversity, including the endemic Olympic Marmot, Roosevelt elk, bobcats and one of the last Pacific salmon runs in the lower 48.

programme.title: South Americas Weirdest Animals
programme.desc: South America is a rich and diverse land. Stunning landscapes harbor elusive critters that have evolved to thrive here. But survival is not assured because the abundant prey is closely followed by powerful predators. From giant killer dolphins to the largest cat in the Americas, this vast continent is a lethal predator battleground.

programme.title: Strangest Nature
programme.desc: Evolution has created countless wondrous creatures that are colorful, amazing and strange. The darker side of nature reveals some of the most bizarre forms natural selection has produced. Alien animals reveal their otherworldly features. Stick insects disguise even their droppings as twigs, water striders glide on liquid as if defying physics, and dragonfly nymphs strike with spring-loaded jaws while breathing through gills in their abdomen. Beneath the beaches of South Africa, plough snails lie buried, breathing through siphons as they swarm dead flesh in the surf. From kelp forests to freshwater pools, camouflage, mutation, and isolation have created animals that are stranger than fiction.

programme.title: National Parks: USA
programme.desc: Along Washington States rugged coast, Olympic National Park protects 1 million acres of diverse habitat. Coastal fog hits glacier-capped mountains, drenching the land in record rainfall and giving rise to temperate rainforests. This unique landscape hosts a rich biodiversity, including the endemic Olympic Marmot, Roosevelt elk, bobcats and one of the last Pacific salmon runs in the lower 48.

programme.title: National Parks: USA
programme.desc: As the first national park founded to protect wildlife and ecological richness, the Everglades teems with life above and below water. This land of diversity boasts nine unique ecosystems, each shaped by the wet and dry seasons ebb and flow. Roseate spoonbills, black bears, alligators, bottlenose dolphins and panthers all thrive in the largest subtropical wilderness in North America.

programme.title: National Parks: USA
programme.desc: Zions iconic landscapes feature soaring red spires against a clear blue sky. Beyond canyons and cliffs, water emerges as a surprising force. The humble Virgin River, sculpting a geologic masterpiece over millennia, sustains diverse life in Zion National Park. Climbers, bighorn sheep, wild turkeys, and globe mallow bees all find refuge alongside this flowing lifeline.

programme.title: South Americas Weirdest Animals
programme.desc: South America is a rich and diverse land. Stunning landscapes harbor elusive critters that have evolved to thrive here. But survival is not assured because the abundant prey is closely followed by powerful predators. From giant killer dolphins to the largest cat in the Americas, this vast continent is a lethal predator battleground.

programme.title: South Americas Weirdest Animals
programme.desc: South America is a land of extremes. Many hundred thousand square miles of forests, grasslands and mountains. Existing here is a daunting proposition, and some well-known animals have adapted by growing large or very small, each strategy maximizing their chance of survival.

programme.title: Strangest Nature
programme.desc: Evolution has created countless wondrous creatures that are colorful, amazing and strange. The darker side of nature reveals some of the most bizarre forms natural selection has produced. Gaze into the realm of gulpers: animals who waste no time eating their prey — often swallowing it whole. Something deadly lies silent in the leaf litter of West Africa. The Gaboon viper is loaded with the largest fangs and fastest strike of any snake. Further south, the solifuge, or sun spider, darts through the desert, seeking an unlucky bug to mince with its massive mandibles. Strange mouths are also in the ocean. The moray eel is a bizarre fish, but its most characteristic charm is hiding down its dark throat. These and more lie in store.

programme.title: Strangest Nature
programme.desc: Evolution has created countless wondrous creatures that are colorful, amazing and strange. The darker side of nature reveals some of the most bizarre forms natural selection has produced. Examine the weirdest animals that hide deep beneath the soils surface. A worm explodes from the seabed to yank fish into its mucky pit; a beetle tunnels deep into warm, wet dung; and a miniature digger excavates miles of tunnel with its teeth! Some hunt in swarms to overwhelm living prey, while solo operators rely on disguise and trickery to trap victims. Tunnellers display bizarre and ingenious solutions to survive in cramped, stuffy and dark conditions.

programme.title: Strangest Nature
programme.desc: Evolution has created countless wondrous creatures that are colorful, amazing and strange. The darker side of nature reveals some of the most bizarre forms natural selection has produced. Alien animals reveal their otherworldly features. Stick insects disguise even their droppings as twigs, water striders glide on liquid as if defying physics, and dragonfly nymphs strike with spring-loaded jaws while breathing through gills in their abdomen. Beneath the beaches of South Africa, plough snails lie buried, breathing through siphons as they swarm dead flesh in the surf. From kelp forests to freshwater pools, camouflage, mutation, and isolation have created animals that are stranger than fiction.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol
programme.desc: With more than 19,000 patients, Dr. Pol has seen it all. Specializing in large farm animals, this senior is anything but retiring as he takes an old-school, non-nonsense approach to veterinary medicine. Unflappable and unstoppable, this doc routinely puts in 14-hour days and is a legend in his community. This new series travels with him across rural Michigan to care for every family pet and head of livestock in need of his expertise and kindness.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol
programme.desc: With more than 19,000 patients, Dr. Pol has seen it all. Specializing in large farm animals, this senior is anything but retiring as he takes an old-school, non-nonsense approach to veterinary medicine. Unflappable and unstoppable, this doc routinely puts in 14-hour days and is a legend in his community. This new series travels with him across rural Michigan to care for every family pet and head of livestock in need of his expertise and kindness.

programme.title: Big Cat Week
programme.desc: RUSSIAS WILD TIGER records the battle for survival of the big cats and reveals intimate details of their lives. The animals they prey on are also in the film: tigers couldnt survive without sika deer, Altai wapiti, wild boars and Asian black bears. A young tiger, born in a conservation area, will guide the viewer through the film. RUSSIAS WILD TIGER accompanies him throughout the year after he leaves his mother. His search for a territory reveals the problems facing tigers in Russias Far East, and the conflicts that arise when he strays into human settlements. The young tiger takes the viewer to places where the fate of Siberian tigers will be decided: vast forests, remote villages and the cities at the edge of the wilderness.

programme.title: Eye Of the Leopard (Revealed)
programme.desc: National Geographic filmmakers Dereck and Beverly Joubert set out to create a film on leopards but never imagined they would be seduced by a small, eight-day-old cub named Legadema. Eye of the Leopard follows Legademas journey from a playful cub to a skilled huntress. Narrated by Jeremy Irons.
